Success: [[lookup @damage.onSave capitalize activity=qNI6W02jCUQbPpYE]] damage.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=teMMQNDDIE9XkPN3]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=teMMQNDDIE9XkPN3]]-foot Cone.

Failure: The target can't take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

1/2 Speed | Action Restrictions.name: 1/2 Speed | Action Restrictions
1/2 Speed | Action Restrictions.description: The target can’t take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

Couatl.name: Couatl
Couatl.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Shielded Mind.name: Shielded Mind
Shielded Mind.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s thoughts can't be read by any means, and other creatures can communicate with it telepathically only if it allows them.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of the biter's next turn.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=IgOMjRxAt7UISkJq]], one [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=IgOMjRxAt7UISkJq]] creature the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=IgOMjRxAt7UISkJq]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage. The target has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]), and it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the grapple ends.

Grappled and Restrained.name: Grappled and Restrained
Grappled and Restrained.description:
Escape Tests (see source item for DC)

[[/check skill=ath ability=str]]

[[/check skill=acr ability=dex]]

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplShapechang]{Shapechange} (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell)

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCreateFood]{Create Food and Water}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDream00000]{Dream}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSleep00000]{Sono}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Shapechange.name: Shapechange
Shapechange.description:
You shape-shift into another creature for the duration or until you take a Magic action to shape-shift into a different eligible form. The new form must be of a creature that has a Challenge Rating no higher than your level or Challenge Rating. You must have seen the sort of creature before, and it can't be a Construct or an Undead.

When you shape-shift, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to the Hit Points of the form. The spell ends early if you have no Temporary Hit Points left.

Your game statistics are replaced by the stat block of the chosen form, but you retain your creature type; alignment; personality; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; Hit Points; Hit Point Dice; proficiencies; and ability to communicate. If you have the Spellcasting feature, you retain it too.

Upon shape-shifting, you determine whether your equipment drops to the ground or changes in size and shape to fit the new form while you're in it.

Create Food and Water.name: Create Food and Water
Create Food and Water.description: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of fresh water on the ground or in containers within range—both useful in fending off the hazards of malnutrition and dehydration. The food is bland but nourishing and looks like a food of your choice, and the water is clean. The food spoils after 24 hours if uneaten.

Dream.name: Dream
Dream.description:
You target a creature you know on the same plane of existence. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state to act as a dream messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] and has a Speed of 0.

If the target is asleep, the messenger appears in the target's dreams and can converse with the target as long as it remains asleep, through the spell's duration. The messenger can also shape the dream's environment, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the spell. The target recalls the dream perfectly upon waking.

If the target is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the target to sleep, at which point the messenger enters its dreams.

You can make the messenger terrifying to the target. If you do so, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words, and then the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target gains no benefit from its rest, and it takes 3d6 Psychic damage when it wakes up.

Trance State.name: Trance State
Trance State.description: While in the trance, the messenger is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0.

Greater Restoration.name: Greater Restoration
Greater Restoration.description:
You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it:

  • 1 &Reference[Exhaustion] level
  • The &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Petrified] condition
  • A curse, including the target's Attunement to a cursed magic item
  • Any reduction to one of the target's ability scores
  • Any reduction to the target's Hit Point maximum

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Sleep.name: Sono
Sleep.description:
Cada criatura à sua escolha em uma Esfera de 1,5 metro de raio centrada em um ponto no alcance da magia deve ser bem-sucedida em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição Inconsciente pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Criaturas que não dormem, como elfos, ou que têm Imunidade à condição Exaustão, são automaticamente bem-sucedidas nas salvaguardas contra esta magia.

Sleeping.name: Dormindo
Sleeping.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição &Reference[unconscious] pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Crab.name: Crab
Crab.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can breathe air and water.

Hold Breath.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can hold its breath for 1 hour.

Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]). While Grappled, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition.

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained
Grappled & Restrained.description:
If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC). While Grappled, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition.

Escape Tests (see source item for DC)

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]], +4 to hit with spell attacks):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{Luz}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia}

2/Day: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommand000]{Command}

1/Day: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person}

Spiritual Weapon.name: Spiritual Weapon
Spiritual Weapon.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpiritualW]{Spiritual Weapon} spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

z817Et9IPt6qHawH.name: Spiritual Weapon
z817Et9IPt6qHawH.description:
You create a floating, spectral force that resembles a weapon of your choice and lasts for the duration. The force appears within range in a space of your choice, and you can immediately make one melee spell attack against one creature within 5 feet of the force. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for every slot level above 2.

Light.name: Luz
Light.description:
Você toca em um objeto Grande ou menor que não está sendo usado ou carregado por outra pessoa. Até que a magia termine, o objeto emite Luz Plena em um raio de 6 metros e meia-luz por mais 6 metros. A luz pode ter a cor que você desejar.

Cobrir o objeto com algo opaco bloqueia a luz. A magia se encerra se você a conjurar novamente.

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Command.name: Comando
Command.description:
Você profere uma palavra única de comando para uma criatura à sua vista e no alcance da magia. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou segue o comando no próximo turno dele. Escolha o comando a partir destas opções:

Abaixar. O alvo tem a condição Caído e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Aproximar. O alvo se move em sua direção pela rota mais curta e direta, terminando o turno dele se ele se mover a até 1,5 metro de você.

Fugir. O alvo usa o próprio turno se afastando de você pelos meios mais rápidos disponíveis.

Largar.O alvo solta o que estiver segurando e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Parar. No turno do alvo, ele não se move e não executa nenhuma ação ou Ação Bônus.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher um efeito adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Hold Person.name: Hold Person
Hold Person.description:
Choose a Humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[paralyzed apply=false] condition for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional Humanoid for each spell slot level above 2.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Holy Symbol.name: Holy Symbol
Holy Symbol.description:
Um Símbolo Sagrado assume uma das formas na tabela Símbolo Sagrado e é adornado ou pintado para canalizar magia divina. Um Clérigo ou Paladino pode usar um Símbolo Sagrado como um Foco de Conjuração.

A tabela indica se um Símbolo Sagrado precisa ser segurado, usado ou exibido em tecido (como um tabardo ou um estandarde) ou em um Escudo.

Símbolos Sagrados
SímboloPesoCusto
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyAmuletworn]{Amuleto} (usado ou segurado)0,5 kg5 PO
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyEmblemborn]{Emblema} (carregado em tecido ou em um escudo)—5 PO
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyReliquaryh]{Relicário} (segurado)1 kg5 PO

Crush.name: Crush
Crush.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} had Advantage on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition and is &Reference[suffocating apply=false]{suffocating} while the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is attached in this way.

While attached to a target, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target.

A creature can take an action to try to detach the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} from itself, doing so with a successful [[/check format=long]]. On its turn, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

Blinded & Suffocating.name: Blinded & Suffocating
Blinded & Suffocating.description: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition and is &Reference[suffocating apply=false]{suffocating} while the attacking creature is attached to the target.

Self: Attack Adv./0 Speed.name: Self: Attack Adv./0 Speed
Self: Attack Adv./0 Speed.description: While attached to a target, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can’t benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target.

Darkness Aura.name: Darkness Aura
Darkness Aura.description: Magical Darkness fills a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=amat5Ii4NydseA0h]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name]]{monster}. This effect lasts while the [[lookup @name]]{monster} maintains Concentration on it, up to [[lookup @duration.value activity=amat5Ii4NydseA0h]] minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it.

[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=F0T3hYR3EtUEMhvs]].

First Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition. While Poisoned, the target's Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and it repeats the save every 24 hours that elapse, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Subsequent Failures: The Poisoned target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 ([[/r 1d10]]).

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description:

Subsequent CON Save Failures: The Poisoned target’s Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 ([[/r 1d10]]).</p>

Exalted Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplShapechang]{Shapechange} (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell)

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRaiseDead0]{Raise Dead}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Shapechange.name: Shapechange
Shapechange.description:
You shape-shift into another creature for the duration or until you take a Magic action to shape-shift into a different eligible form. The new form must be of a creature that has a Challenge Rating no higher than your level or Challenge Rating. You must have seen the sort of creature before, and it can't be a Construct or an Undead.

When you shape-shift, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to the Hit Points of the form. The spell ends early if you have no Temporary Hit Points left.

Your game statistics are replaced by the stat block of the chosen form, but you retain your creature type; alignment; personality; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; Hit Points; Hit Point Dice; proficiencies; and ability to communicate. If you have the Spellcasting feature, you retain it too.

Upon shape-shifting, you determine whether your equipment drops to the ground or changes in size and shape to fit the new form while you're in it.

Commune.name: Commune
Commune.description:
You contact a deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question.

Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive "unclear" as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the DM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Raise Dead.name: Raise Dead
Raise Dead.description:
With a touch, you revive a dead creature if it has been dead no longer than 10 days and it wasn't Undead when it died.

The creature returns to life with 1 Hit Point. This spell also neutralizes any poisons that affected the creature at the time of death.

This spell closes all mortal wounds, but it doesn't restore missing body parts. If the creature is lacking body parts or organs integral for its survival—its head, for instance—the spell automatically fails.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 1)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 2)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 4)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 3)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Divine Aid.name: Divine Aid
Divine Aid.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Curar Ferimentos}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse} using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Cure Wounds.name: Curar Ferimentos
Cure Wounds.description:
Uma criatura que você toca recupera um número de Pontos de Vida igual a 2d8 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Remove Curse.name: Remove Curse
Remove Curse.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Dire Wolf.name: Dire Wolf
Dire Wolf.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Djinni.name: Djinni
Djinni.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Elemental Restoration.name: Elemental Restoration
Elemental Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in [[/r 1d4#Days]] days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Air.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Wishes.name: Wishes
Wishes.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has a [[/r 1d100cs<31#Knows Wish on 1]]{30 percent} chance of knowing the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can understand. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts the spell for the creature, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has cast it three times, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't do so again for 365 days.

Wish.name: Wish
Wish.description:
Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter reality itself.

The basic use of this spell is to duplicate any other spell of level 8 or lower. If you use it this way, you don't need to meet any requirements to cast that spell, including costly components. The spell simply takes effect.

Alternatively, you can create one of the following effects of your choice:

Object Creation. You create one object of up to 25,000 PO in value that isn't a magic item. The object can be no more than 300 feet in any dimension, and it appears in an unoccupied space that you can see on the ground.

Instant Health. You allow yourself and up to twenty creatures that you can see to regain all Hit Points, and you end all effects on them listed in the Greater Restoration spell.

Resistance. You grant up to ten creatures that you can see Resistance to one damage type that you choose. This Resistance is permanent.

Spell Immunity. You grant up to ten creatures you can see immunity to a single spell or other magical effect for 8 hours.

Sudden Learning. You replace one of your feats with another feat for which you are eligible. You lose all the benefits of the old feat and gain the benefits of the new one. You can't replace a feat that is a prerequisite for any of your other feats or features.

Roll Redo. You undo a single recent event by forcing a reroll of any die roll made within the last round (including your last turn). Reality reshapes itself to accommodate the new result. For example, a Wish spell could undo an ally's failed saving throw or a foe's Critical Hit. You can force the reroll to be made with Advantage or Disadvantage, and you choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

Reshape Reality. You may wish for something not included in any of the other effects. To do so, state your wish to the DM as precisely as possible. The DM has great latitude in ruling what occurs in such an instance; the greater the wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong. This spell might simply fail, the effect you desire might be achieved only in part, or you might suffer an unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. For example, wishing that a villain were dead might propel you forward in time to a period when that villain is no longer alive, effectively removing you from the game. Similarly, wishing for a Legendary magic item or an Artifact might instantly transport you to the presence of the item's current owner. If your wish is granted and its effects have consequences for a whole community, region, or world, you are likely to attract powerful foes. If your wish would affect a god, the god's divine servants might instantly intervene to prevent it or to encourage you to craft the wish in a particular way. If your wish would undo the multiverse itself, threaten the City of Sigil, or affect the Lady of Pain in any way, you see an image of her in your mind for a moment; she shakes her head, and your wish fails.

The stress of casting Wish to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. After enduring that stress, each time you cast a spell until you finish a Long Rest, you take 1d10 Necrotic damage per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented in any way. In addition, your Strength score becomes 3 for 2d4 days. For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than light activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a [[/r 1d3cs1]]{33 percent chance} that you are unable to cast Wish ever again if you suffer this stress.

Wish Stress.name: Wish Stress
Wish Stress.description: Each time you cast a spell until you finish a Long Rest, you take [[/damage 1d10 type=necrotic]] damage per level of that spell. This damage can’t be reduced or prevented in any way. In addition, your Strength score becomes 3 for [[/r 2d4]] days.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .mmStormBlade0000]] or [[/item .mmStormBolt00000]] in any combination.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCreateFood]{Create Food and Water} (can create wine instead of water), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplTongues000]{Tongues}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWindWalk00]{Wind Walk}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCreation00]{Creation}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGaseousFor]{Gaseous Form}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMajorImage]{Major Image}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Create Food and Water.name: Create Food and Water
Create Food and Water.description: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of fresh water on the ground or in containers within range—both useful in fending off the hazards of malnutrition and dehydration. The food is bland but nourishing and looks like a food of your choice, and the water is clean. The food spoils after 24 hours if uneaten.

Tongues.name: Tongues
Tongues.description: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand any spoken or signed language that it hears or sees. Moreover, when the target communicates by speaking or signing, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it if that creature can hear the speech or see the signing.

Wind Walk.name: Wind Walk
Wind Walk.description:
You and up to ten willing creatures of your choice within range assume gaseous forms for the duration, appearing as wisps of cloud. While in this cloud form, a target has a Fly Speed of 300 feet and can hover; it has Immunity to the Prone condition; and it has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. The only actions a target can take in this form are the &Reference[Dash] action or a Magic action to begin reverting to its normal form. Reverting takes 1 minute, during which the target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition. Until the spell ends, the target can revert to cloud form, which also requires a Magic action followed by a 1-minute transformation.

If a target is in cloud form and flying when the effect ends, the target descends 60 feet per round for 1 minute until it lands, which it does safely. If it can't land after 1 minute, it falls the remaining distance.

Cloud Form.name: Cloud Form
Cloud Form.description: The only actions a target can take in this form are the &Reference[Dash] action or a Magic action to begin reverting to its normal form. Reverting takes 1 minute, during which the target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition. Until the spell ends, the target can revert to cloud form, which also requires a Magic action followed by a 1-minute transformation.

Creation.name: Creation
Creation.description:
You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create an object within range. It is either an object of vegetable matter (soft goods, rope, wood, and the like) or mineral matter (stone, crystal, metal, and the like). The object must be no larger than a 5-foot Cube, and the object must be of a form and material that you have seen.

The spell's duration depends on the object's material, as shown in the Materials table. If the object is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest duration. Using any object created by this spell as another spell's Material component causes the other spell to fail.

MaterialDuration
Vegetable matter24 hours
Stone or crystal12 hours
Precious metals1 hour
Gems10 minutes
Adamantine or mithral1 minute

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The Cube increases by 5 feet for each spell slot level above 5.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
A willing creature you touch shape-shifts, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends on the target if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if it takes a Magic action to end the spell on itself.

While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can't attack or cast spells.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
The target’s only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can’t talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can’t attack or cast spells.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Major Image.name: Major Image
Major Image.description:
You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot Cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted, but it can't deal damage or cause conditions.

If you are within range of the illusion, you can take a Magic action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, for things can pass through it. A creature that takes a Study action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to the creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring Concentration, if cast with a level 4+ spell slot.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Create Whirlwind.name: Create Whirlwind
Create Whirlwind.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=TYNKL0QDItFpbR2G]]-foot-radius, [[lookup @target.template.height activity=TYNKL0QDItFpbR2G]]-foot-high [[lookup @target.template.type capitalize activity=TYNKL0QDItFpbR2G]] centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Concentration on it ends. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns.

Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect.

Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=TYNKL0QDItFpbR2G]] (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is unaffected).

Failure: While in the whirlwind, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the Restrained target takes [[/damage average]] damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description:
The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and moves with the whirlwind.

At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Storm Bolt.name: Storm Bolt
Storm Bolt.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Doppelganger.name: Doppelganger
Doppelganger.description:
Doppelganger

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.1HjQuidJ5OdJh2Nd caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmSlam0000000000]] attacks and uses [[/item .mmUnsettlingVisa]] if available.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: [[/attack]] ([[lookup @activation.condition activity=mEQjWdqU7zGv6Ott]]), reach [[lookup @range.value activity=mEQjWdqU7zGv6Ott]] [[lookup @range.units activity=mEQjWdqU7zGv6Ott]]. [[/damage average extended]].

Read Thoughts.name: Read Thoughts
Read Thoughts.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]).

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Unsettling Visage.name: Unsettling Visage
Unsettling Visage.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=USxIbGZPLvfPnnoI]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=USxIbGZPLvfPnnoI]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=USxIbGZPLvfPnnoI]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} that can see the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After [[lookup @duration.value activity=USxIbGZPLvfPnnoI]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=USxIbGZPLvfPnnoI]], it succeeds automatically.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts into a [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=EU2q25V5hIaM1ZlR]], or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Draft Horse.name: Draft Horse
Draft Horse.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can breathe air and water.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a [[/item .mmTail0000000000]].

Tail.name: Tail
Tail.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=5iI1KQRWrdMGh9sy]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=5iI1KQRWrdMGh9sy]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=5iI1KQRWrdMGh9sy]]-foot Cone.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

Dretch.name: Dretch
Dretch.description:
Dretches

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.Tp3r2uMnilo9SUIu caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Dretch

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.YeZoNZxhdDHR3iC2 caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Fetid Cloud.name: Fetid Cloud
Fetid Cloud.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=vRnhmBCQqIwIlfS4]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=vRnhmBCQqIwIlfS4]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can’t take Reactions.

Drider.name: Drider
Drider.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Sunlight Sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Sunlight Sensitivity.description: While in sunlight, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

Web Walker.name: Web Walker
Web Walker.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .mmForeleg0000000]] or [[/item .mmPoisonBurst000]] in any combination.

Magic of the Spider Queen.name: Magic of the Spider Queen
Magic of the Spider Queen.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Escuridão}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]{Fogo das Fadas}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWeb0000000]{Web}, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]).

Darkness.name: Darkness
Darkness.description:
For the duration, magical &Reference[darkness] spreads from a point within range and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Darkvision can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the Darkness to fill a 15-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the Darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Bright Light or Dim Light created by a spell of level 2 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.

Faerie Fire.name: Fogo das Fadas
Faerie Fire.description:
Objetos em um Cubo de 6 metros de lado no alcance da magia são delineados por luz azul, verde ou violeta (à sua escolha). Cada criatura no Cubo também é delineada se falhar em uma salvaguarda de Destreza. Pela duração da magia, objetos e criaturas afetadas emitem &Reference[dimlight] em um raio de 3 metros e não podem se beneficiar da condição Invisível.

Jogadas de ataque contra uma criatura ou objeto afetado têm Vantagem se o atacante puder vê-la.

Outlined.name: Delineado
Outlined.description:
Pela duração da magia, objetos e criaturas afetadas emitem &Reference[dimlight] em um raio de 3 metros e não podem se beneficiar da condição Invisível.

Jogadas de ataque contra uma criatura ou objeto afetado têm Vantagem se o atacante puder vê-la.

Web.name: Web
Web.description:
You conjure a mass of sticky webbing at a point within range. The webs fill a 20-foot Cube there for the duration. The webs are &Reference[difficultterrain], and the area within them is &Reference[lightlyobscured].

If the webs aren't anchored between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling, the web collapses on itself, and the spell ends at the start of your next turn. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 feet.

The first time a creature enters the webs on a turn or starts its turn there, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained] condition while in the webs or until it breaks free.

A creature Restrained by the webs can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained.

The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot Cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing [[/damage 2d4 type=fire]] damage to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.

Druid.name: Druida
Druid.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two attacks, using [[/item .mmVineStaff00000]] or [[/item .mmVerdantWisp000]] in any combination.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Arte druídica}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{Speak with Animals}

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEntangle00]{Entangle}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThunderwav]{Onda Trovejante}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAnimalMess]{Animal Messenger}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLongstride]{Passos Largos}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMoonbeam00]{Moonbeam}

Druidcraft.name: Arte Druídica
Druidcraft.description:
Sussurrando para os espíritos da natureza, você cria um dos seguintes efeitos no alcance da magia.

Sensor Meterológico. Você cria um efeito sensorial minúsculo e inofensivo que prevê qual será o clima no local onde você está pelas próximas 24 horas. O efeito pode se manifestar como uma esfera dourada para céu claro, uma nuvem para chuva, flocos de neve caindo para neve e assim por diante. Esse efeito persiste por 1 rodada.

Florescer. Você instantaneamente faz uma flor desabrochar, uma vagem se abrir ou um botão de folha se abrir.

Efeito Sensorial. Você cria um efeito sensorial inofensivo, como folhas caindo, fadas dançantes espectrais, uma brisa suave, o som de um animal ou o leve odor de gambá. O efeito deve caber em um Cubo de 1,5 metro de lado.

Brincar com Fogo. Você acende ou apaga uma vela, uma tocha ou uma fogueira.

Speak with Animals.name: Falar com Animais
Speak with Animals.description:
Pela duração da magia, você pode compreender e se comunicar verbalmente com Feras, e pode usar com elas qualquer uma das opções de perícia da ação Influenciar.

A maioria das Feras oferece pouca informação sobre assuntos que não estejam diretamente ligados à sobrevivência ou ao companheirismo mas, no mínimo, uma Fera pode fornecer informações sobre áreas vizinhas e monstros, incluindo o que percebeu no último dia.

changes.system.traits.languages.custom: ;compreender e se comunicar verbalmente com feras

Entangle.name: Entangle
Entangle.description:
Grasping plants sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into &Reference[difficultterrain]. They disappear when the spell ends.

Each creature (other than you) in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Thunderwave.name: Onda Trovejante
Thunderwave.description:
Você libera uma onda de energia estrondosa. Cada criatura em um Cubo de 4,5 metros originado em você realiza uma salvaguarda de Constituição. Se falhar, uma criatura sofre 2d8 pontos de dano Trovejante e é empurrada a 3 metros de distância de você. Em caso de sucesso, uma criatura sofre apenas metade do dano.

Além disso, objetos soltos que estão totalmente dentro do Cubo são empurrados 3 metros para longe de você, e um estrondo trovejante é audível a até 90 metros.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. O dano aumenta em 1d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Animal Messenger.name: Animal Messenger
Animal Messenger.description:
A Tiny Beast of your choice that you can see within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw, or it attempts to deliver a message for you (if the target's Challenge Rating isn't 0, it automatically succeeds). You specify a location you have visited and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a person dressed in the uniform of the town guard" or "a red-haired dwarf wearing a pointed hat." You also communicate a message of up to twenty-five words. The Beast travels for the duration toward the specified location, covering about 25 miles per 24 hours or 50 miles if the Beast can fly.

When the Beast arrives, it delivers your message to the creature that you described, mimicking your communication. If the Beast doesn't reach its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the Beast returns to where you cast the spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The spell's duration increases by 48 hours for each spell slot level above 2.

Carrying Message.name: Carrying Message
Carrying Message.description:
The Beast travels for the duration toward the specified location, covering about 25 miles per 24 hours or 50 miles if the Beast can fly.

When the Beast arrives, it delivers your message to the creature that you described, mimicking your communication. If the Beast doesn’t reach its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the Beast returns to where you cast the spell.

Longstrider.name: Passos Largos
Longstrider.description:
Você toca uma criatura. O deslocamento do alvo aumenta em 3 metros até a magia terminar.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Longstrider.name: Passos Largos
Longstrider.description: O deslocamento do alvo aumenta em 3 metros até a magia terminar.

Moonbeam.name: Moonbeam
Moonbeam.description:
A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, Dim Light fills the Cylinder, and you can take a Magic action on later turns to move the Cylinder up to 60 feet.

When the Cylinder appears, each creature in it makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d10 Radiant damage, and if the creature is shape-shifted (as a result of the Polymorph spell, for example), it reverts to its true form and can't shape-shift until it leaves the Cylinder. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only. A creature also makes this save when the spell's area moves into its space and when it enters the spell's area or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 2.

Dryad.name: Dryad
Dryad.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Speak with Beasts and Plants.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
Speak with Beasts and Plants.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item .mmVineLash000000]] or [[/item .mmThornBurst0000]] attack, and it can use Spellcasting to cast [[/item .mmSpellcasting00.Activity.bAmZSyK4cn33HwwI]].

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAnimalFrie]{Amizade Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCharmMonst]{Charm Monster} (lasts 24 hours; ends early if the dryad casts the spell again), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Arte druídica}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEntangle00]{Entangle}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Passo sem Rastro}

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: If within [[lookup @range.value activity=8av8Lh1jNLCrOJny]] feet of a [[lookup @range.special activity=8av8Lh1jNLCrOJny]], the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} teleports to an unoccupied space within [[lookup @range.value activity=8av8Lh1jNLCrOJny]] feet of a second [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=8av8Lh1jNLCrOJny]] that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

Animal Friendship.name: Amizade Animal
Animal Friendship.description:
Escolha como alvo uma Fera à sua vista e no alcance da magia. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] pela duração da magia. Se você ou um de seus aliados causar dano ao alvo, a magia encerra.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Charmed.name: Enfeitiçado
Charmed.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] pela duração da magia. Se você ou um de seus aliados causar dano ao alvo, a magia encerra.

Charm Monster.name: Charm Monster
Charm Monster.description:
One creature you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw. It does so with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 4.

Charmed.name: Enfeitiçado
Charmed.description: The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Druidcraft.name: Arte Druídica
Druidcraft.description:
Sussurrando para os espíritos da natureza, você cria um dos seguintes efeitos no alcance da magia.

Sensor Meterológico. Você cria um efeito sensorial minúsculo e inofensivo que prevê qual será o clima no local onde você está pelas próximas 24 horas. O efeito pode se manifestar como uma esfera dourada para céu claro, uma nuvem para chuva, flocos de neve caindo para neve e assim por diante. Esse efeito persiste por 1 rodada.

Florescer. Você instantaneamente faz uma flor desabrochar, uma vagem se abrir ou um botão de folha se abrir.

Efeito Sensorial. Você cria um efeito sensorial inofensivo, como folhas caindo, fadas dançantes espectrais, uma brisa suave, o som de um animal ou o leve odor de gambá. O efeito deve caber em um Cubo de 1,5 metro de lado.

Brincar com Fogo. Você acende ou apaga uma vela, uma tocha ou uma fogueira.

Entangle.name: Entangle
Entangle.description:
Grasping plants sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into &Reference[difficultterrain]. They disappear when the spell ends.

Each creature (other than you) in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Pass without Trace.name: Pass without Trace
Pass without Trace.description: You radiate a concealing aura in a 30-foot Emanation for the duration. While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Concealed.name: Concealed
Concealed.description: While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Dust Mephit.name: Dust Mephit
Dust Mephit.description:
Mephits

Death Burst.name: Death Burst
Death Burst.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} explodes [[lookup @activation.condition activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]].

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Blinding Breath.name: Blinding Breath
Blinding Breath.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=soAO2jRWos8FsxeU]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=soAO2jRWos8FsxeU]]-foot Cone.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Blinded.name: Blinded
Blinded.description: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the end of the user's next turn.

Sleep.name: Sono
Sleep.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSleep00000] spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]).

CF13ievxQ48W9L9w.name: Sono
CF13ievxQ48W9L9w.description:
Cada criatura à sua escolha em uma Esfera de 1,5 metro de raio centrada em um ponto no alcance da magia deve ser bem-sucedida em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição Inconsciente pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Criaturas que não dormem, como elfos, ou que têm Imunidade à condição Exaustão, são automaticamente bem-sucedidas nas salvaguardas contra esta magia.

Sleeping.name: Dormindo
Sleeping.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição &Reference[unconscious] pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Eagle.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Earth Elemental.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Earth Glide.name: Earth Glide
Earth Glide.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

Siege Monster.name: Siege Monster
Siege Monster.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} deals double damage to objects and structures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two attacks, using [[/item .mmSlam0000000000]] or [[/item .mmRockLaunch0000]] in any combination.
