Elemental Restoration.name: Elemental Restoration
Elemental Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} [[lookup @item.requirements]], its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in [[/r 1d4#Days]] days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Wishes.name: Wishes
Wishes.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has a [[/r 1d100cs<31#Knows Wish on 1]]{30 percent} chance of knowing the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can understand. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts the spell for the creature, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has cast it three times, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't do so again for 365 days.

Wish.name: Wish
Wish.description:
Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter reality itself.

The basic use of this spell is to duplicate any other spell of level 8 or lower. If you use it this way, you don't need to meet any requirements to cast that spell, including costly components. The spell simply takes effect.

Alternatively, you can create one of the following effects of your choice:

Object Creation. You create one object of up to 25,000 PO in value that isn't a magic item. The object can be no more than 300 feet in any dimension, and it appears in an unoccupied space that you can see on the ground.

Instant Health. You allow yourself and up to twenty creatures that you can see to regain all Hit Points, and you end all effects on them listed in the Greater Restoration spell.

Resistance. You grant up to ten creatures that you can see Resistance to one damage type that you choose. This Resistance is permanent.

Spell Immunity. You grant up to ten creatures you can see immunity to a single spell or other magical effect for 8 hours.

Sudden Learning. You replace one of your feats with another feat for which you are eligible. You lose all the benefits of the old feat and gain the benefits of the new one. You can't replace a feat that is a prerequisite for any of your other feats or features.

Roll Redo. You undo a single recent event by forcing a reroll of any die roll made within the last round (including your last turn). Reality reshapes itself to accommodate the new result. For example, a Wish spell could undo an ally's failed saving throw or a foe's Critical Hit. You can force the reroll to be made with Advantage or Disadvantage, and you choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

Reshape Reality. You may wish for something not included in any of the other effects. To do so, state your wish to the DM as precisely as possible. The DM has great latitude in ruling what occurs in such an instance; the greater the wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong. This spell might simply fail, the effect you desire might be achieved only in part, or you might suffer an unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. For example, wishing that a villain were dead might propel you forward in time to a period when that villain is no longer alive, effectively removing you from the game. Similarly, wishing for a Legendary magic item or an Artifact might instantly transport you to the presence of the item's current owner. If your wish is granted and its effects have consequences for a whole community, region, or world, you are likely to attract powerful foes. If your wish would affect a god, the god's divine servants might instantly intervene to prevent it or to encourage you to craft the wish in a particular way. If your wish would undo the multiverse itself, threaten the City of Sigil, or affect the Lady of Pain in any way, you see an image of her in your mind for a moment; she shakes her head, and your wish fails.

The stress of casting Wish to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. After enduring that stress, each time you cast a spell until you finish a Long Rest, you take 1d10 Necrotic damage per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented in any way. In addition, your Strength score becomes 3 for 2d4 days. For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than light activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a [[/r 1d3cs1]]{33 percent chance} that you are unable to cast Wish ever again if you suffer this stress.

Wish Stress.name: Wish Stress
Wish Stress.description: Each time you cast a spell until you finish a Long Rest, you take [[/damage 1d10 type=necrotic]] damage per level of that spell. This damage can’t be reduced or prevented in any way. In addition, your Strength score becomes 3 for [[/r 2d4]] days.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .mmHeatedBlade000]] or [[/item .mmHurlFlame00000]] in any combination.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplElementali]{Elementalism}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGaseousFor]{Gaseous Form}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMajorImage]{Major Image}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplTongues000]{Tongues}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{Wall of Fire} (level 7 version)

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Elementalism.name: Elementalism
Elementalism.description:
You exert control over the elements, creating one of the following effects within range.

Beckon Air. You create a breeze strong enough to ripple cloth, stir dust, rustle leaves, and close open doors and shutters, all in a 5-foot Cube. Doors and shutters being held open by someone or something aren't affected.

Beckon Earth. You create a thin shroud of dust or sand that covers surfaces in a 5-foot-square area, or you cause a single word to appear in your handwriting in a patch of dirt or sand.

Beckon Fire. You create a thin cloud of harmless embers and colored, scented smoke in a 5-foot Cube. You choose the color and scent, and the embers can light candles, torches, or lamps in that area. The smoke's scent lingers for 1 minute.

Beckon Water. You create a spray of cool mist that lightly dampens creatures and objects in a 5-foot Cube. Alternatively, you create 1 cup of clean water either in an open container or on a surface, and the water evaporates in 1 minute.

Sculpt Element. You cause dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water that can fit in a 1-foot Cube to assume a crude shape (such as that of a creature) for 1 hour.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
A willing creature you touch shape-shifts, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends on the target if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if it takes a Magic action to end the spell on itself.

While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can't attack or cast spells.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
The target’s only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can’t talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can’t attack or cast spells.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Major Image.name: Major Image
Major Image.description:
You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot Cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted, but it can't deal damage or cause conditions.

If you are within range of the illusion, you can take a Magic action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, for things can pass through it. A creature that takes a Study action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to the creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring Concentration, if cast with a level 4+ spell slot.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Tongues.name: Tongues
Tongues.description: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand any spoken or signed language that it hears or sees. Moreover, when the target communicates by speaking or signing, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it if that creature can hear the speech or see the signing.

Wall of Fire.name: Wall of Fire
Wall of Fire.description:
You create a wall of fire on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 feet in diameter, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration.

When the wall appears, each creature in its area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d8 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, deals 5d8 Fire damage to each creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of that side or inside the wall. A creature takes the same damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no damage.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 4.

Prone.name: Caído

Diabolical Restoration.name: Diabolical Restoration
Diabolical Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Magic Rope.name: Magic Rope
Magic Rope.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has a magic rope. While bearing it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can use the [[/item .mmEntanglingRope]] action. The rope has AC 20, HP 90, and Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points, if it is 5+ feet away from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} for 1 hour or more, or if the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can fully restore it when finishing a Short or Long Rest.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmWitheringSword]] attacks and can use [[/item .mmEntanglingRope]].

Parry.name: Parry
Parry.description: Trigger: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is [[lookup @activation.condition activity=aLG3BRZL7P6OEjwd]]. Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} adds [[lookup @roll.formula activity=aLG3BRZL7P6OEjwd]] to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

Entangling Rope.name: Entangling Rope
Entangling Rope.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=n8nEah4vbrEPphNF]], one creature the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=n8nEah4vbrEPphNF]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the rope is destroyed, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} uses a Bonus Action to release the target, or the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} uses Entangling Rope again.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the rope is destroyed.

Ettercap.name: Ettercap
Ettercap.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Web Walker.name: Web Walker
Web Walker.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

Web Strand.name: Web Strand
Web Strand.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Ln5NXBaHGKlwdoiP]], one Large or smaller [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Ln5NXBaHGKlwdoiP]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=Ln5NXBaHGKlwdoiP]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the web is destroyed.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attack and one [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] attack.

Reel.name: Reel
Reel.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} pulls [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=jWkEQYHBd7aht1kG]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=jWkEQYHBd7aht1kG]] feet of itself that is Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet straight toward itself.

Ettin.name: Ettin
Ettin.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Battleaxe.name: Battleaxe

Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.description:
Whenever the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} starts its turn &Reference[Bloodied], roll [[/r 1d6]]. On a 6, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} attacks an object. Once the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s creator, if within [[lookup @range.value activity=tnkOsrSwEElO2kZM]] feet of the berserk [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a [[/check ability=cha skill=per dc=@abilities.str.dc]] DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still Bloodied.

Berserk.name: Berserk

Ooze Cube.name: Ooze Cube
Ooze Cube.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Engulf and has Disadvantage on the saving throw.

Creatures inside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} have &Reference[Total Cover], and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time.

As an action, a creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=EcTOfXWsDJRHLydy]] [[lookup @range.units activity=EcTOfXWsDJRHLydy]]. of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can pull a creature or an object out of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} by succeeding on a [[/check dc=12 ability=str skill=ath format=long]], and the puller takes [[/damage average activity=PMCvyqxfUYiPzNK8]] damage.

Total Cover.name: Total Cover
Total Cover.description: Creatures inside the attacking creature have Total Cover.

Transparent.name: Transparent
Transparent.description: Even when the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a [[/check dc=15 ability=wis skill=prc format=long]] to notice the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} if the creature hasn't witnessed the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} move or otherwise act.

Engulf.name: Engulf
Engulf.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the @UUID[.mmOozeCube000000] trait).

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=5o0Bh8PQaojx5XMx]], each creature whose space the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} enters for the first time during this move.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is &Reference[suffocating], can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, and takes [[/damage average]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns. When the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@abilities.str.dc]] check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space.

Success: Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.

Total Cover, Suffocating & Restrained.name: Total Cover, Suffocating & Restrained
Total Cover, Suffocating & Restrained.description: An engulfed target is &Reference[suffocating], can’t cast spells with a Verbal component, has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, and takes [[/damage average 3d6 type=acid]] damage at the start of each of the user's turns.

Etherealness.name: Etherealness
Etherealness.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEtherealne]{Etherealness} spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

88qd0Ulz7AMzouDU.name: Etherealness
88qd0Ulz7AMzouDU.description:
You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration. During this time, you can move in any direction. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can perceive the plane you left, which looks gray, and you can't see anything there more than 60 feet away.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can affect and be affected only by creatures, objects, and effects on that plane. Creatures that aren't on the Ethereal Plane can't perceive or interact with you unless a feature gives them the ability to do so.

When the spell ends, you return to the plane you left in the spot that corresponds to your space in the Border Ethereal. If you appear in an occupied space, you are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and take Force damage equal to twice the number of feet you are moved.

This spell ends instantly if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn't border it, such as one of the Outer Planes.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.You can target up to three willing creatures (including yourself) for each spell slot level above 7. The creatures must be within 10 feet of you when you cast the spell.

Horrific Visage.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=v8KiqUloIE5eocSu]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=v8KiqUloIE5eocSu]]-foot Cone that can see the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and isn't an Undead.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Success: The target is immune to this [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Horrifying Visage for 24 hours.

Possession.name: Possession
Possession.description:
Charisma Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=7gmNBVjwuYTyANMe]], one [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=7gmNBVjwuYTyANMe]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=7gmNBVjwuYTyANMe]] feet.

Failure: The target is possessed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}; the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} disappears, and the target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition and loses control of its body. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours.

Success: The target is immune to this [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Possession for 24 hours.

While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, and it has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the frog.

While swallowing the target, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't use Bite, and if the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, the swallowed target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
You create an Invisible sensor within range in a location familiar to you (a place you have visited or seen before) or in an obvious location that is unfamiliar to you (such as behind a door, around a corner, or in a grove of trees). The intangible, invulnerable sensor remains in place for the duration.

When you cast the spell, choose seeing or hearing. You can use the chosen sense through the sensor as if you were in its space. As a Bonus Action, you can switch between seeing and hearing.

A creature that sees the sensor (such as a creature benefiting from See Invisibility or &Reference[truesight]) sees a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling.

While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, and it has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

In addition, the target takes [[/damage average]] damage at the end of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can have only one target swallowed at a time, and it can't use Bite while it has a swallowed target.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Gibbering.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} babbles incoherently while it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=PyGOI84k0PPYrru8]], any [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=PyGOI84k0PPYrru8]] that starts its turn within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=PyGOI84k0PPYrru8]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} while it is babbling.

Failure: The target rolls [[/r 1d8]] to determine what it does during the current turn:

1–4. The target does nothing.

5–6. The target takes no action or Bonus Action and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.

7–8. The target makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

Demonic Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Escuridão}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplConfusion0]{Confusion}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFly0000000]{Fly}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordS]{Power Word Stun}

Darkness.name: Darkness
Darkness.description:
For the duration, magical &Reference[darkness] spreads from a point within range and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Darkvision can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the Darkness to fill a 15-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the Darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Bright Light or Dim Light created by a spell of level 2 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Confusion.name: Confusion
Confusion.description:
Each creature in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw, or that target can't take Bonus Actions or Reactions and must roll 1d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn, consulting the table below.

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.tables24.RollTable.phbsplConfusionB rollable cite=false classes="caption-top"]{Behavior for the Turn}

At the end of each of its turns, an affected target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The Sphere's radius increases by 5 feet for each spell slot level above 4.

Confused.name: Confused
Confused.description:
The target can’t take Bonus Actions or Reactions and must roll 1d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn, consulting the table below.

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.tables24.RollTable.phbsplConfusionB rollable cite=false classes="caption-top"]{Behavior for the Turn}

At the end of each of its turns, an affected target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Fly.name: Fly
Fly.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft unless it can stop the fall.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Power Word Stun.name: Power Word Stun
Power Word Stun.description:
You overwhelm the mind of one creature you can see within range. If the target has 150 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Stunned condition. Otherwise, its Speed is 0 until the start of your next turn.

The &Reference[Stunned apply=false] target makes a [[/save ability=con dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the condition on itself on a success.

Stunned.name: Stunned
Stunned.description: The &Reference[Stunned apply=false] target makes a [[/save ability=con]] saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the condition on itself on a success.

No Movement.description: The target's Speed is 0 until the start of your next turn.

Fire Breath.name: Fire Breath
Fire Breath.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=bDqgmtLG3zcVuqdi]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=bDqgmtLG3zcVuqdi]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=bDqgmtLG3zcVuqdi]]-foot-long, [[lookup @target.template.width activity=bDqgmtLG3zcVuqdi]]-foot-wide Line.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Weakening Breath.name: Weakening Breath
Weakening Breath.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=EGZ4bS4HpJkfNG9s]], each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=EGZ4bS4HpJkfNG9s]]-foot Cone.

Failure: The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests and subtracts 2 ([[/r 1d4]]) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After [[lookup @duration.value activity=EGZ4bS4HpJkfNG9s]] minute, it succeeds automatically.

Weakened.name: Weakened
Weakened.description: The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests and subtracts 2 (1d4) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Gorgon.name: Gorgon
Gorgon.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Gore.name: Gore
Gore.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended average]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition if the attacking creature used its moving attack feature.

Petrifying Breath.name: Petrifying Breath
Petrifying Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=reU3RXAk0MdPmKCl]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=reU3RXAk0MdPmKCl]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=reU3RXAk0MdPmKCl]]-foot Cone.

First Failure: The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Second Failure: The target has the &Reference[Petrified apply=false] condition instead of the Restrained condition.

Petrified.name: Petrified
Petrified.description: The target has the &Reference[Petrified apply=false] condition instead of the Restrained condition.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: The target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Trample.name: Trample
Trample.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=QckCIpsC3BdEHycI]], [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=QckCIpsC3BdEHycI]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=QckCIpsC3BdEHycI]] feet that has the Prone condition.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: [[lookup @damage.onSave capitalize activity=QckCIpsC3BdEHycI]] damage.

Amorphous.name: Amorphous
Amorphous.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

Corrosive Form.name: Corrosive Form
Corrosive Form.description:
Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative −1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches −5. The penalty can be removed by casting the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000]{Reparar} spell on the weapon.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal or wood in 1 round.

Nota do Foundry

This feature provides an Attack Penalty active effect that will modify a targeted weapon. Since this penalty can be applied multiple times to multiple nonmagical weapons, this active effect needs to be dragged from this item's Effect tab onto the target Item's weapons.

Damaged: -1 Attack.name: Damaged: -1 Attack
Damaged: -1 Attack.description: Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative −1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the attacking creature and coming into contact with it.

Pseudopod.name: Pseudopod
Pseudopod.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a −1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000]{Reparar} spell on the armor.

Nota do Foundry

This feature provides an AC Penalty enchantment that will modify a targeted armor. Since this penalty can be applied multiple times, this enchantment needs to be dragged from this item's Effect tab onto the target armor item.

Damaged: -1 AC.name: Damaged: -1 AC
Damaged: -1 AC.description: Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a −1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000]{Reparar} spell on the armor.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=lnabW9bM51HoluPp]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=lnabW9bM51HoluPp]]-foot [[lookup @target.template.type capitalize activity=lnabW9bM51HoluPp]].

Green Hag.name: Green Hag
Green Hag.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can breathe air and water.

Coven Magic.name: Coven Magic
Coven Magic.description: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.int.dc]]): @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAugury0000]{Augury}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Convocar Familiar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{Identificar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLocateObje]{Locate Object}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplUnseenServ]{Unseen Servant}. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

Augury.name: Augury
Augury.description:
You receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses the omen from the Omens table.

OmenFor Results That Will Be …
WealGood
WoeBad
Weal and woeGood and bad
IndifferenceNeither good nor bad

The spell doesn't account for circumstances, such as other spells, that might change the results.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Find Familiar.name: Find Familiar
Find Familiar.description:
You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: Bat, Cat, Frog, Hawk, Lizard, Octopus, Owl, Rat, Raven, Spider, Weasel, or another Beast that has a Challenge Rating of 0. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form (see appendix B), though it is a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend (your choice) instead of a Beast. Your familiar acts independently of you, but it obeys your commands.

Telepathic Connection. While your familiar is within 100 feet of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as a Bonus Action, you can see through the familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special senses it has.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver the touch. Your familiar must be within 100 feet of you, and it must take a Reaction to deliver the touch when you cast the spell.

Combat. The familiar is an ally to you and your allies. It rolls its own Initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.

Disappearance of the Familiar. When the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points, it disappears. It reappears after you cast this spell again. As a Magic action, you can temporarily dismiss the familiar to a pocket dimension. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As a Magic action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you. Whenever the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points or disappears into the pocket dimension, it leaves behind in its space anything it was wearing or carrying.

One Familiar Only. You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new eligible form.

Identify.name: Identify
Identify.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell's casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell's name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.

Locate Object.name: Locate Object
Locate Object.description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location if that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement.

The spell can locate a specific object known to you if you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon.

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Unseen Servant.name: Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
This spell creates an Invisible, mindless, shapeless, Medium force that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 Hit Point, and a Strength of 2, and it can't attack. If it drops to 0 Hit Points, the spell ends.

Once on each of your turns as a Bonus Action, you can mentally command the servant to move up to 15 feet and interact with an object. The servant can perform simple tasks that a human could do, such as fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks. Once you give the command, the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until it completes the task, then waits for your next command.

If you command the servant to perform a task that would move it more than 60 feet away from you, the spell ends.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful [[/check format=long]].

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] attacks.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]], +4 to hit with spell attacks):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDancingLig]{Luzes Dançantes}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self} (24-hour duration), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while Invisible), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofSickn]{Ray of Sickness} (level 3 version)

Dancing Lights.name: Luzes Dançantes
Dancing Lights.description:
Você cria até quatro luzes do tamanho de tochas no alcance da magia, fazendo com que elas pareçam tochas, lanternas ou esferas brilhantes que pairam pela duração da magia. Como alternativa, você combina as quatro luzes em uma forma Média, brilhante, a qual é vagamente humanoide. Seja qual for a forma que você escolher, cada luz emite Meia-luz em um raio de 3 metros.

Como uma Ação Bônus, você pode mover as luzes até 18 metros para um espaço no alcance da magia. Uma luz deve estar a até 6 metros de outra luz criada por esta magia, e uma luz desaparece se ultrapassar o alcance da magia.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Minor Illusion.name: Ilusão Menor
Minor Illusion.description:
Você cria um som ou uma imagem de um objeto no alcance da magia que permanece pela duração da magia. Veja as descrições abaixo para os efeitos de cada um. A ilusão encerra se você conjurar essa magia novamente.

Uma criatura pode perceber a ilusão ao executar a ação estudar para examinar o som ou a imagem e ser bem-sucedida em um teste de [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] contra a CD para evitar sua magia. A ilusão se torna desbotada para uma criatura que consiga discerni-la.

Som. Se você criar um som, o volume pode variar de um sussurro a um grito. Pode ser sua voz, a voz de outra pessoa, o rugido de um leão, o bater de tambores ou qualquer outro som que você escolher. O som continua ininterrupto pela duração da magia, ou você pode criar sons distintos em diferentes momentos antes que a magia termine.

Imagem. Se você criar a imagem de um objeto — como uma cadeira, pegadas enlameadas ou um pequeno baú — ela não pode ter dimensões superiores a um cubo de 1,5 metro de lados. A imagem não pode gerar som, luz, cheiro ou qualquer outro efeito sensorial. A interação física com a imagem demonstra que se trata de uma ilusão, pois os objetos podem atravessá-la.

Ray of Sickness.name: Ray of Sickness
Ray of Sickness.description:
You shoot a greenish ray at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 Poison damage and has the &Reference[poisoned] condition until the end of your next turn.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 1.

Grick.name: Grick
Grick.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item Beak]] attack and one [[/item Tentacles]] attack.

Grappled.name: Agarrado
Grappled.description: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC).

Grappled.description: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC) from both of the attacking creature's front claws.

Guardian Naga.name: Guardian Naga
Guardian Naga.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Celestial Restoration.name: Celestial Restoration
Celestial Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, it returns to life in [[/r 1d6#Days]] days and regains all its Hit Points unless @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil] is cast on its remains.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item Bite]] attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of [[/item Poisonous Spittle]].

Poisonous Spittle.name: Poisonous Spittle
Poisonous Spittle.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=r4plP8QiJxzFZZO7]], [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=r4plP8QiJxzFZZO7]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=r4plP8QiJxzFZZO7]] feet.

Failure: 31 (7d8) Poison damage, and the target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Success: Half damage only.

Blinded.name: Blinded
Blinded.description: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature ’s next turn.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplClairvoyan]{Clairvoyance}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Curar Ferimentos} (level 6 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFlameStrik]{Flame Strike} (level 6 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGeas000000]{Geas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplTrueSeeing]{True Seeing}

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
You create an Invisible sensor within range in a location familiar to you (a place you have visited or seen before) or in an obvious location that is unfamiliar to you (such as behind a door, around a corner, or in a grove of trees). The intangible, invulnerable sensor remains in place for the duration.

When you cast the spell, choose seeing or hearing. You can use the chosen sense through the sensor as if you were in its space. As a Bonus Action, you can switch between seeing and hearing.

A creature that sees the sensor (such as a creature benefiting from See Invisibility or &Reference[truesight]) sees a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Cure Wounds.name: Curar Ferimentos
Cure Wounds.description:
Uma criatura que você toca recupera um número de Pontos de Vida igual a 2d8 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Flame Strike.name: Flame Strike
Flame Strike.description:
A vertical column of brilliant fire roars down from above. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d6 Fire damage and 5d6 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The Fire damage and the Radiant damage increase by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 5.

Geas.name: Geas
Geas.description:
You give a verbal command to a creature that you can see within range, ordering it to carry out some service or refrain from an action or a course of activity as you decide. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. The target automatically succeeds if it can't understand your command.

While Charmed, the creature takes [[/damage 5d10 type=psychic]] damage if it acts in a manner directly counter to your command. It takes this damage no more than once each day.

You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the spell ends.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell ends this spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. If you use a level 7 or 8 spell slot, the duration is 365 days. If you use a level 9 spell slot, the spell lasts until it is ended by one of the spells mentioned above.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} sings a magical melody, which lasts until the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Concentration ends on it.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=dxxqZP7Vo01te3QB]], each [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=dxxqZP7Vo01te3QB]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=dxxqZP7Vo01te3QB]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} when the song starts.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While Charmed, the target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies.

If the target is more than 5 feet from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, the target moves on its turn toward the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}. It doesn't avoid &Reference[OpportunityAttacks]; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, the target repeats the save.

Success: The target is immune to this [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Luring Song for 24 hours.

Charmed & Incapacitated.name: Charmed & Incapacitated
Charmed & Incapacitated.description:
The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns.

While Charmed, the target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition.

Ice Wall.name: Ice Wall
Ice Wall.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWallofIce0]{Wall of Ice} (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.int.dc]]).

Wall of Ice.name: Wall of Ice
Wall of Ice.description:
You create a wall of ice on a solid surface within range. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a globe with a radius of up to 10 feet, or you can shape a flat surface made up of ten 10-foot-square panels. Each panel must be contiguous with another panel. In any form, the wall is 1 foot thick and lasts for the duration.

If the wall cuts through a creature's space when it appears, the creature is pushed to one side of the wall (you choose which side) and makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d6 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

The wall is an object that can be damaged and thus breached. It has AC 12 and 30 Hit Points per 10-foot section, and it has Immunity to Cold, Poison, and Psychic damage and Vulnerability to Fire damage. Reducing a 10-foot section of wall to 0 Hit Points destroys it and leaves behind a sheet of frigid air in the space the wall occupied.

A creature moving through the sheet of frigid air for the first time on a turn makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 5d6 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage the wall deals when it appears increases by 2d6 and the damage from passing through the sheet of frigid air increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 6.

Ice Spear.description:

Its game statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEtherealne]{Etherealness}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDream00000]{Dream}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHypnoticPa]{Hypnotic Pattern}

Nightmare.name: Nightmare
Nightmare.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Y9H9ImnMcffBZlH3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Y9H9ImnMcffBZlH3]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=Y9H9ImnMcffBZlH3]] feet.

Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition for [[lookup @duration.value activity=Y9H9ImnMcffBZlH3]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=Y9H9ImnMcffBZlH3]], until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes [[/damage average]] damage.

Unconscious.name: Unconscious
Unconscious.description: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Etherealness.name: Etherealness
Etherealness.description:
You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration. During this time, you can move in any direction. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can perceive the plane you left, which looks gray, and you can't see anything there more than 60 feet away.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can affect and be affected only by creatures, objects, and effects on that plane. Creatures that aren't on the Ethereal Plane can't perceive or interact with you unless a feature gives them the ability to do so.

When the spell ends, you return to the plane you left in the spot that corresponds to your space in the Border Ethereal. If you appear in an occupied space, you are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and take Force damage equal to twice the number of feet you are moved.

This spell ends instantly if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn't border it, such as one of the Outer Planes.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.You can target up to three willing creatures (including yourself) for each spell slot level above 7. The creatures must be within 10 feet of you when you cast the spell.

Dream.name: Dream
Dream.description:
You target a creature you know on the same plane of existence. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state to act as a dream messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] and has a Speed of 0.

If the target is asleep, the messenger appears in the target's dreams and can converse with the target as long as it remains asleep, through the spell's duration. The messenger can also shape the dream's environment, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the spell. The target recalls the dream perfectly upon waking.

If the target is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the target to sleep, at which point the messenger enters its dreams.

You can make the messenger terrifying to the target. If you do so, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words, and then the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target gains no benefit from its rest, and it takes 3d6 Psychic damage when it wakes up.

Trance State.name: Trance State
Trance State.description: While in the trance, the messenger is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0.

Hypnotic Pattern.name: Hypnotic Pattern
Hypnotic Pattern.description:
You create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot Cube within range. The pattern appears for a moment and vanishes. Each creature in the area who can see the pattern must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. While Charmed, the creature has the &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] condition and a Speed of 0.

The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.

Hypnotized.name: Hypnotized
Hypnotized.description:
While &Reference[charmed apply=false], the creature has the &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] condition and a Speed of 0.

The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.

Invisible Stalker.name: Invisible Stalker
Invisible Stalker.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Air Form.name: Air Form
Air Form.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has the &Reference[Invisible apply=false] condition.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmWindSwipe00000]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item .mmVortex00000000]].

Vortex.name: Vortex
Vortex.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=cZy0VYbCVY8aRB4z]], one [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=cZy0VYbCVY8aRB4z]] in the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s space.

Failure: [[/damage average activity=cZy0VYbCVY8aRB4z]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes [[/damage average activity=kDz92inkRCjGrPiz]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns.

Grappled.name: Agarrado
Grappled.description:
The target has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC).

Until the grapple ends, the target can’t cast spells with a Verbal component and takes additional damage at the start of each of the NPC’s turns.

Fire Absorption.description: Whenever the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack

Poison Breath.name: Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description:

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Killer Whale.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Sunlight Sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Sunlight Sensitivity.description: While in sunlight, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can breathe air and water.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Siege Monster.name: Siege Monster
Siege Monster.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} deals double damage to objects and structures.

Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmTentacle000000]] attacks and uses [[/item .mmFling000000000]], [[/item .mmLightningStrik]], or [[/item .mmSwallow0000000]].

Tentacle.name: Tentacle
Tentacle.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. The target has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the grapple ends.

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained
Grappled & Restrained.description:

Escape Tests (see origin item for DC)

[[/check skill=ath ability=str]]

[[/check skill=acr ability=dex]]

Fling.name: Fling
Fling.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} throws a [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=E7YKnUIWsavrnNzK]] Grappled by it to a space it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=E7YKnUIWsavrnNzK]] feet of itself [[lookup @range.special activity=E7YKnUIWsavrnNzK]].

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=E7YKnUIWsavrnNzK]], the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Success: Half damage.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Lightning Strike.name: Lightning Strike
Lightning Strike.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=v39JwGqgfaKiA4vc]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=v39JwGqgfaKiA4vc]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=v39JwGqgfaKiA4vc]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]], [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]] Grappled by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time).

Failure: [[/damage average activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]] damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and takes [[/damage average activity=zrWNjO9mkbN28spL]] damage at the start of each of its turns.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must succeed on a [[/save format=long activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} with the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

Restrained & Total Cover.name: Restrained & Total Cover
Restrained & Total Cover.description: While swallowed, a creature has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, has &Reference[Total Cover apply=false] against attacks.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If you are regurgitated, you fall into a space within 10 ft. and are &Reference[Prone apply=false].

Escape: Prone.name: Escape: Prone
Escape: Prone.description: Any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting &Reference[Prone apply=false].

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Toxic Ink.name: Toxic Ink
Toxic Ink.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Kquf9zADg0jtKBqw]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Kquf9zADg0jtKBqw]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Kquf9zADg0jtKBqw]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} while it is underwater.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] conditions until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} then moves up to its Speed.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Blinded & Poisoned.name: Blinded & Poisoned
Blinded & Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] conditions until the end of the attacking creature's next turn.
