Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item .mmCorruptingTouc]].

Corrupting Touch.name: Corrupting Touch
Corrupting Touch.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=F4cByCi1IEouN08a]], [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=F4cByCi1IEouN08a]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=F4cByCi1IEouN08a]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target is cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] and &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] conditions.

Cursed, Charmed & Poisoned.name: Cursed, Charmed & Poisoned
Cursed, Charmed & Poisoned.description: Until the curse ends, the target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] and &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] conditions.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self} (can appear as a Large or Medium biped), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGeas000000]{Geas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMajorImage]{Major Image}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}

Leap.name: Leap
Leap.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} jumps up to [[lookup @range.value activity=C28C43DeD8iFtZMe]] feet by [[lookup @activation.condition activity=C28C43DeD8iFtZMe]].

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Minor Illusion.name: Ilusão Menor
Minor Illusion.description:
Você cria um som ou uma imagem de um objeto no alcance da magia que permanece pela duração da magia. Veja as descrições abaixo para os efeitos de cada um. A ilusão encerra se você conjurar essa magia novamente.

Uma criatura pode perceber a ilusão ao executar a ação estudar para examinar o som ou a imagem e ser bem-sucedida em um teste de [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] contra a CD para evitar sua magia. A ilusão se torna desbotada para uma criatura que consiga discerni-la.

Som. Se você criar um som, o volume pode variar de um sussurro a um grito. Pode ser sua voz, a voz de outra pessoa, o rugido de um leão, o bater de tambores ou qualquer outro som que você escolher. O som continua ininterrupto pela duração da magia, ou você pode criar sons distintos em diferentes momentos antes que a magia termine.

Imagem. Se você criar a imagem de um objeto — como uma cadeira, pegadas enlameadas ou um pequeno baú — ela não pode ter dimensões superiores a um cubo de 1,5 metro de lados. A imagem não pode gerar som, luz, cheiro ou qualquer outro efeito sensorial. A interação física com a imagem demonstra que se trata de uma ilusão, pois os objetos podem atravessá-la.

Geas.name: Geas
Geas.description:
You give a verbal command to a creature that you can see within range, ordering it to carry out some service or refrain from an action or a course of activity as you decide. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. The target automatically succeeds if it can't understand your command.

While Charmed, the creature takes [[/damage 5d10 type=psychic]] damage if it acts in a manner directly counter to your command. It takes this damage no more than once each day.

You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the spell ends.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell ends this spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. If you use a level 7 or 8 spell slot, the duration is 365 days. If you use a level 9 spell slot, the spell lasts until it is ended by one of the spells mentioned above.

Under Orders.name: Under Orders
Under Orders.description: While &Reference[Charmed apply=false], the creature takes [[/damage 5d10 type=psyhic]] damage if it acts in a manner directly counter to your command. It takes this damage no more than once each day.

Major Image.name: Major Image
Major Image.description:
You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot Cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted, but it can't deal damage or cause conditions.

If you are within range of the illusion, you can take a Magic action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, for things can pass through it. A creature that takes a Study action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to the creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring Concentration, if cast with a level 4+ spell slot.

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Lemure.name: Lemure
Lemure.description:
Lemures

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.StGSoy9GntE0mCiY caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Lemure

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.HJOkVF1j68fs3m7Y caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Hellish Restoration.name: Hellish Restoration
Hellish Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies in the Nine Hells, it revives with all its Hit Points in [[/r 1d10]] days unless it is killed by a creature under the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplBless00000]{Benção} spell or its remains are sprinkled with Holy Water.

Lich.name: Lich
Lich.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Component Pouch.name: Component Pouch
Component Pouch.description: A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Spirit Jar.name: Spirit Jar
Spirit Jar.description: If destroyed, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} reforms in [[/r 1d10]] days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s lair.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .6qvUZeTimud7ekV8]] or [[/item .9p8yotv4r7nt3NWl]] in any combination.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireball00]{Fireball} (level 5 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLightningB]{Lightning Bolt} (level 5 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbsplMageHand00]{Mãos Mágicas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitação Arcana}

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAnimateDea]{Animate Dead}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDimensionD]{Dimension Door}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplChainLight]{Chain Lightning}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFingerofDe]{Finger of Death}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordK]{Power Word Kill}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Fireball.name: Fireball
Fireball.description:
A bright streak flashes from you to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into a fiery explosion. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried start burning.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

Mage Hand.name: Mãos Mágicas
Mage Hand.description:
Uma mão espectral flutuante aparece em um ponto que você escolher no alcance da magia. A mão permanece pela duração. A mão desaparece se estiver a mais de 9 metros de você ou se você conjurar esta magia novamente.

Ao conjurar a magia, você pode usar a mão para manipular um objeto, abrir uma porta ou um recipiente destrancado, guardar ou recolher itens de recipientes abertos, ou despejar o conteúdo de um frasco.

Como uma ação Usar Magia em seus próximos turnos, você pode controlar a mão novamente. Como parte dessa ação, você pode mover a mão até 9 metros.

A mão não pode atacar, ativar itens mágicos ou carregar mais de 5 quilos.

Prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitação Arcana
Prestidigitation.description:
Você cria um efeito mágico dentro da distância da magia. Escolha o efeito dentre as opções abaixo. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter três de seus efeitos não instantâneos ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Efeito Sensorial. Você cria um efeito sensorial instantâneo e inofensivo, como uma chuva de faíscas, um sopro de vento, notas musicais suaves ou um odor estranho.

Brincar com Fogo. Você instantaneamente acende ou apaga uma vela, uma tocha ou uma pequena fogueira.

Limpo ou sujo. Você limpa ou suja instantaneamente um objeto com menos de 30 centímetros de lado.

Sensação Menor. Você esfria, aquece ou dá sabor a um material não vivo com menos de 30 centímetros cúbicos por 1 hora.

Marca Mágica Você faz aparecer uma cor, uma pequena marca ou um símbolo em um objeto ou superfície por 1 hora.

Criação Menor. Você cria uma bugiganga não mágica ou uma imagem ilusória que caiba em sua mão. Ela dura até o fim do seu próximo turno. Uma bugiganga não pode causar dano e não tem valor monetário.

Animate Dead.name: Animate Dead
Animate Dead.description:
Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small Humanoid within range. The target becomes an Undead creature: a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbmobSkeleton00]{Skeleton} if you chose bones or a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbmobZombie0000]{Zombie} if you chose a corpse.

On each of your turns, you can take a Bonus Action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell if the creature is within 60 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move on its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature takes the Dodge action and moves only to avoid harm. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four creatures you have animated with this spell rather than animating a new creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You animate or reassert control over two additional Undead creatures for each spell slot level above 3. Each of the creatures must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.

Dimension Door.name: Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
You teleport to a location within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 feet straight downward" or "300 feet upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle."

You can also teleport one willing creature. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you teleport, and it teleports to a space within 5 feet of your destination space.

If you, the other creature, or both would arrive in a space occupied by a creature or completely filled by one or more objects, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 Force damage, and the teleportation fails.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Chain Lightning.name: Chain Lightning
Chain Lightning.description:
You launch a lightning bolt toward a target you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets of your choice, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object and can be targeted by only one of the bolts.

Each target makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d8 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. One additional bolt leaps from the first target to another target for each spell slot level above 6.

Finger of Death.name: Finger of Death
Finger of Death.description:
You unleash negative energy toward a creature you can see within range. The target makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 7d8 + 30 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

A Humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbmobZombie0000]{Zombie} (see appendix B) that follows your verbal orders.

Power Word Kill.name: Power Word Kill
Power Word Kill.description: You compel one creature you can see within range to die. If the target has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, it takes 12d12 Psychic damage.

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Protective Magic.name: Protective Magic
Protective Magic.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCounterspe]{Counterspell} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplShield0000]{Shield} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.

Shield.name: Égide
Shield.description: Uma barreira imperceptível de energia mágica o protege. Até o início do seu próximo turno, você recebe um bônus de +5 na CA, incluindo contra o ataque que ativou a magia, e não sofre dano de @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{mísseis mágicos}.

Imperceptible Barrier.name: Barreira Imperceptível
Imperceptible Barrier.description: Até o início do seu próximo turno, você recebe um bônus de +5 na CA, incluindo contra o ataque que ativou a magia, e não sofre dano de mísseis mágicos.

Deathly Teleport.name: Deathly Teleport
Deathly Teleport.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] [[lookup @range.units activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]]. [[lookup @range.special activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]], and each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] [[lookup @target.template.units activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]]. of the space it left takes [[/damage average]] damage.

Disrupt Life.name: Disrupt Life
Disrupt Life.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]] that isn't an Undead in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Frightening Gaze.name: Frightening Gaze
Frightening Gaze.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFear000000]{Fear}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Fear.name: Fear
Fear.description:
Each creature in a 30-foot Cone must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and have the &Reference[frightened apply=false] condition for the duration.

A Frightened creature takes the &Reference[dash] action and moves away from you by the safest route on each of its turns unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a space where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the creature makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends on that creature.

Fear.name: Fear
Fear.description: A &Reference[frightened apply=false] creature takes the &Reference[dash] action and moves away from you by the safest route on each of its turns unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a space where it doesn’t have line of sight to you, the creature makes a [[/save ability=wis]] saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends on that creature.

Paralyzing Touch.name: Paralyzing Touch
Paralyzing Touch.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature's next turn.

Lion.name: Lion
Lion.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Running Leap.name: Running Leap
Running Leap.description: With a 10-foot running start, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmRend0000000000]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item .mmRoar0000000000]].

Roar.name: Roar
Roar.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]], one creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature’s next turn.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Lizard.name: Lizard
Lizard.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Mage.name: Mage
Mage.description:
Mages

Wand.name: Wand
Wand.description: Um @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Foco Arcano} é adornado com joias ou esculpido para canalizar magia arcana. Um bruxo, feiticeiro ou mago pode usar esse item como foco de conjuração.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmArcaneBurst000]] attacks.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{Luz}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]{Armadura Arcana} (included in AC), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{Mãos Mágicas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitação Arcana}

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireball00]{Fireball} (level 4 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplConeofCold]{Cone of Cold}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFly0000000]{Fly}

Misty Step.name: Passo Nebuloso
Misty Step.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{Passo Nebuloso}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

BtkwckQJktc8hRh0.name: Passo Nebuloso
BtkwckQJktc8hRh0.description: Brevemente cercado por uma névoa prateada, você se teleporta até 9 metros para um espaço desocupado à sua vista.

Protective Magic.name: Protective Magic
Protective Magic.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCounterspe]{Counterspell} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplShield0000]{Shield} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.

Shield.name: Égide
Shield.description: Uma barreira imperceptível de energia mágica o protege. Até o início do seu próximo turno, você recebe um bônus de +5 na CA, incluindo contra o ataque que ativou a magia, e não sofre dano de @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{mísseis mágicos}.

Imperceptible Barrier.name: Barreira Imperceptível
Imperceptible Barrier.description: Até o início do seu próximo turno, você recebe um bônus de +5 na CA, incluindo contra o ataque que ativou a magia, e não sofre dano de mísseis mágicos.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Light.name: Luz
Light.description:
Você toca em um objeto Grande ou menor que não está sendo usado ou carregado por outra pessoa. Até que a magia termine, o objeto emite Luz Plena em um raio de 6 metros e meia-luz por mais 6 metros. A luz pode ter a cor que você desejar.

Cobrir o objeto com algo opaco bloqueia a luz. A magia se encerra se você a conjurar novamente.

Mage Armor.name: Armadura Arcana
Mage Armor.description: Você toca uma criatura voluntária que não está usando armadura. Até que a magia termine, a CA base do alvo se torna 13 mais o modificador de Destreza dele. A magia se encerra se o alvo vestir uma armadura.

Mage Armor.name: Armadura Arcana
Mage Armor.description: A CA base do alvo se torna 13 mais o modificador de Destreza dele.

Mage Hand.description:

Ao conjurar a magia, você pode usar a mão para manipular um objeto, abrir uma porta ou um recipiente destrancado, guardar ou recolher itens de recipientes abertos, ou despejar o conteúdo de um frasco.

A mão não pode atacar, ativar itens mágicos ou carregar mais de 5 quilos.

Flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried start burning.

Invisible.name: Invisible

Cone of Cold.description:
You unleash a blast of cold air. Each creature in a 60-foot Cone originating from you makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 5.

Fly.name: Fly
Fly.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft unless it can stop the fall.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Mage Armor.name: Armadura Arcana
Mage Armor.description: A CA base do alvo se torna 13 mais o modificador de Destreza dele.

Magma Mephit.description:
Mephits

Death Burst.description:

Touch.name: Touch
Touch.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature or a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

Ignited Illumination.name: Ignited Illumination
Ignited Illumination.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} sets itself ablaze or extinguishes its flames. While ablaze, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

Mammoth.name: Mammoth
Mammoth.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmGore0000000000]] attacks.

Gore.name: Gore
Gore.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended average]]. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition if the attacking creature used its moving attack feature.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]], +9 to hit with spell attacks):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAnimateDea]{Animate Dead}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHarm000000]{Harm}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInsectPlag]{Insect Plague} (level 7 version)

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Animate Dead.name: Animate Dead
Animate Dead.description:
Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small Humanoid within range. The target becomes an Undead creature: a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbmobSkeleton00]{Skeleton} if you chose bones or a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.phbmobZombie0000]{Zombie} if you chose a corpse.

On each of your turns, you can take a Bonus Action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell if the creature is within 60 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move on its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature takes the Dodge action and moves only to avoid harm. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four creatures you have animated with this spell rather than animating a new creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You animate or reassert control over two additional Undead creatures for each spell slot level above 3. Each of the creatures must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.

Harm.name: Harm
Harm.description: You unleash virulent magic on a creature you can see within range. The target makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 14d6 Necrotic damage, and its Hit Point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage it took. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage only. This spell can't reduce a target's Hit Point maximum below 1.

Insect Plague.name: Insect Plague
Insect Plague.description:
Swarming locusts fill a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The Sphere remains for the duration, and its area is &Reference[LightlyObscured] and &Reference[DifficultTerrain].

When the swarm appears, each creature in it makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 4d10 Piercing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature also makes this save when it enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 5.

Whirlwind of Sand.name: Whirlwind of Sand
Whirlwind of Sand.description: Trigger: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is hit by an attack roll. Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} adds 2 to its AC against the attack, possibly causing the attack to miss, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=EsBmMUQMO4b0g6Yw]] [[lookup @range.units activity=EsBmMUQMO4b0g6Yw]]. [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=EsBmMUQMO4b0g6Yw]]. Each creature of its choice that it can see within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=EsBmMUQMO4b0g6Yw]] [[lookup @target.template.units activity=EsBmMUQMO4b0g6Yw]]. of its destination space has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

+2 AC.name: +2 AC
+2 AC.description: The attacking creature adds 2 to its AC against the attack, possibly causing the attack to miss.

Blinded.name: Blinded
Blinded.description: Each creature of the attacking creature's choice that it can see within 5 ft. of its destination space has the &Reference[Blinded apply=long] condition until the end of the attacking creature's next turn.

Dread Command.name: Dread Command
Dread Command.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommand000]{Command} (level 2 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Command.name: Comando
Command.description:
Você profere uma palavra única de comando para uma criatura à sua vista e no alcance da magia. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou segue o comando no próximo turno dele. Escolha o comando a partir destas opções:

Abaixar. O alvo tem a condição Caído e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Aproximar. O alvo se move em sua direção pela rota mais curta e direta, terminando o turno dele se ele se mover a até 1,5 metro de você.

Fugir. O alvo usa o próprio turno se afastando de você pelos meios mais rápidos disponíveis.

Largar.O alvo solta o que estiver segurando e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Parar. No turno do alvo, ele não se move e não executa nenhuma ação ou Ação Bônus.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher um efeito adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Necrotic Strike.name: Necrotic Strike
Necrotic Strike.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item .mmRottingFist000]] or [[/item .d6GVHcFrHv83C7eS]] attack.

Coven Magic.name: Coven Magic
Coven Magic.description: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.int.dc]]): @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAugury0000]{Augury}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Convocar Familiar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{Identificar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLocateObje]{Locate Object}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplUnseenServ]{Unseen Servant}. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

Augury.name: Augury
Augury.description:
You receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses the omen from the Omens table.

OmenFor Results That Will Be …
WealGood
WoeBad
Weal and woeGood and bad
IndifferenceNeither good nor bad

The spell doesn't account for circumstances, such as other spells, that might change the results.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Find Familiar.name: Find Familiar
Find Familiar.description:
You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: Bat, Cat, Frog, Hawk, Lizard, Octopus, Owl, Rat, Raven, Spider, Weasel, or another Beast that has a Challenge Rating of 0. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form (see appendix B), though it is a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend (your choice) instead of a Beast. Your familiar acts independently of you, but it obeys your commands.

Telepathic Connection. While your familiar is within 100 feet of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as a Bonus Action, you can see through the familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special senses it has.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver the touch. Your familiar must be within 100 feet of you, and it must take a Reaction to deliver the touch when you cast the spell.

Combat. The familiar is an ally to you and your allies. It rolls its own Initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.

Disappearance of the Familiar. When the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points, it disappears. It reappears after you cast this spell again. As a Magic action, you can temporarily dismiss the familiar to a pocket dimension. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As a Magic action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you. Whenever the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points or disappears into the pocket dimension, it leaves behind in its space anything it was wearing or carrying.

One Familiar Only. You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new eligible form.

Identify.name: Identify
Identify.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell's casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell's name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.

Locate Object.name: Locate Object
Locate Object.description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location if that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement.

The spell can locate a specific object known to you if you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon.

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Unseen Servant.name: Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
This spell creates an Invisible, mindless, shapeless, Medium force that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 Hit Point, and a Strength of 2, and it can't attack. If it drops to 0 Hit Points, the spell ends.

Once on each of your turns as a Bonus Action, you can mentally command the servant to move up to 15 feet and interact with an object. The servant can perform simple tasks that a human could do, such as fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks. Once you give the command, the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until it completes the task, then waits for your next command.

If you command the servant to perform a task that would move it more than 60 feet away from you, the spell ends.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Soul Bag.name: Soul Bag
Soul Bag.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can use its Nightmare Haunting action.

The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and Resistance to all damage. The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can create a new bag after 7 days.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] attacks.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEtherealne]{Etherealness}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Mísseis Mágicos} (level 4 version)

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPhantasmal]{Phantasmal Killer}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift} (self only)

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Nightmare Haunting.name: Nightmare Haunting
Nightmare Haunting.description:
While on the Ethereal Plane, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDream00000]{Dream}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=4GGGVhvLSrHgHdb9]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=4GGGVhvLSrHgHdb9]]. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbEvilAndGoodPr]{Protection from Evil and Good} spell or within a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicCircl]{Magic Circle} spell.

If the target takes damage from the Dream spell, the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage. If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.

Dream.name: Dream
Dream.description:
You target a creature you know on the same plane of existence. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state to act as a dream messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] and has a Speed of 0.

If the target is asleep, the messenger appears in the target's dreams and can converse with the target as long as it remains asleep, through the spell's duration. The messenger can also shape the dream's environment, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the spell. The target recalls the dream perfectly upon waking.

If the target is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the target to sleep, at which point the messenger enters its dreams.

You can make the messenger terrifying to the target. If you do so, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words, and then the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target gains no benefit from its rest, and it takes 3d6 Psychic damage when it wakes up.

Trance State.name: Trance State
Trance State.description: While in the trance, the messenger is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0.

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Etherealness.name: Etherealness
Etherealness.description:
You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration. During this time, you can move in any direction. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can perceive the plane you left, which looks gray, and you can't see anything there more than 60 feet away.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can affect and be affected only by creatures, objects, and effects on that plane. Creatures that aren't on the Ethereal Plane can't perceive or interact with you unless a feature gives them the ability to do so.

When the spell ends, you return to the plane you left in the spot that corresponds to your space in the Border Ethereal. If you appear in an occupied space, you are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and take Force damage equal to twice the number of feet you are moved.

This spell ends instantly if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn't border it, such as one of the Outer Planes.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.You can target up to three willing creatures (including yourself) for each spell slot level above 7. The creatures must be within 10 feet of you when you cast the spell.

Magic Missile.name: Mísseis Mágicos
Magic Missile.description:
Você cria três dardos brilhantes feitos de pura energia mágica. Cada dardo acerta uma criatura à sua escolha, à sua vista e no alcance da magia. Um dardo causa 1d4 + 1 pontos de dano Energético ao alvo. Os dardos acertam ao mesmo tempo, e você pode direcioná-los para uma mesma criatura ou várias.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A magia cria um dardo adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

[[2 + @item.level]]{Dardos Nível [[lookup @item.level]]}

Phantasmal Killer.name: Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
You tap into the nightmares of a creature you can see within range and create an illusion of its deepest fears, visible only to that creature. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 4d10 Psychic damage and has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls for the duration. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage, and the spell ends.

For the duration, the target makes a [[/save ability=wis dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On a failed save, it takes the Psychic damage again. On a successful save, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior.The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 4.

Fears Manifested.name: Fears Manifested
Fears Manifested.description:
The target has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls for the duration.

For the duration, the target makes a [[/save ability=wis]] saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On a failed save, it takes the Psychic damage again. On a successful save, the spell ends.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Nightmare.name: Nightmare
Nightmare.description:
Nightmare

Confer Fire Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can grant Resistance to Fire damage to a rider while it is on the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Resistance: Fire.name: Resistance: Fire
Resistance: Fire.description: The creature can grant Resistance to Fire damage to a rider while it is on the creature.

Illumination.name: Illumination
Illumination.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

Ethereal Stride.name: Ethereal Stride
Ethereal Stride.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and up to [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=0EfvhIXAIPlYUiNE]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=0EfvhIXAIPlYUiNE]] [[lookup @range.units activity=0EfvhIXAIPlYUiNE]]. of it teleport to the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane or vice versa.

Parry.name: Parry
Parry.description: Trigger: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is [[lookup @activation.condition activity=aLG3BRZL7P6OEjwd]]. Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} adds [[lookup @roll.formula activity=aLG3BRZL7P6OEjwd]] to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item Claw]] attacks.

Rotting Gaze.name: Rotting Gaze
Rotting Gaze.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=k4jetEkSCPApNFgz]], [[lookup @target.affects.labels.statblock activity=k4jetEkSCPApNFgz]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=k4jetEkSCPApNFgz]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Weird Insight.name: Weird Insight
Weird Insight.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=o6eFmn0HWGbQjzdG]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=o6eFmn0HWGbQjzdG]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=o6eFmn0HWGbQjzdG]] feet.

Failure: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] magically learns one fact or secret about the target.

Ochre Jelly.name: Ochre Jelly
Ochre Jelly.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Amorphous.name: Amorphous
Amorphous.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Split.name: Split
Split.description:
Trigger: While the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} [[lookup @activation.condition activity=zoXFSgzmWq8frUjI]]

Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} splits into two new [[lookup @name capitalize]]{monster}. Each new [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is one size smaller than the original [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and acts on its Initiative. The original [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Hit Points are divided evenly between the new [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}s (round down).

Octopus.name: Octopus
Octopus.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Ink Cloud.name: Ink Cloud
Ink Cloud.description: Trigger: A creature ends its turn within 5 feet of the octopus while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 5-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is &Reference[heavilyobscured] for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

Compression.name: Compression
Compression.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

Tentacles.name: Tentacles
Tentacles.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from all four tentacles.

Grappled.name: Agarrado
Grappled.description: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC) from all four tentacles.

Ogre.name: Ogre
Ogre.description:
Ogres

Undead Fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
Undead Fortitude.description: If damage reduces the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

Oni.name: Oni
Oni.description:
Oni

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.Z00uEF13gQr3y7sl caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmClaw0000000000]] or [[/item .mmNightmareRay00]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item .mmSpellcasting00]].

Nightmare Ray.name: Nightmare Ray
Nightmare Ray.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature’s next turn

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Large Giant, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]{Enfeitiçar Pessoa} (level 2 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Escuridão}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGaseousFor]{Gaseous Form}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSleep00000]{Sono}

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

7zCgLqwWT0prZxhy.name: Invisibility
7zCgLqwWT0prZxhy.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Charm Person.name: Enfeitiçar Pessoa
Charm Person.description:
Um Humanoide à sua vista e no alcance da magia realiza uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria. Ele tem Vantagem se você ou seus aliados estiverem lutando contra ele. Se falhar, o alvo tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] até que a magia termine ou até que você ou seus aliados causem dano a ele. A criatura Enfeitiçada é Amigável a você. Quando a magia termina, o alvo sabe que foi Enfeitiçado por você.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Charmed.name: Enfeitiçado
Charmed.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] até que a magia termine ou até que você ou seus aliados causem dano a ele. A criatura Enfeitiçada é Amigável a você. Quando a magia termina, o alvo sabe que foi Enfeitiçado por você.

Darkness.name: Darkness
Darkness.description:
For the duration, magical &Reference[darkness] spreads from a point within range and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Darkvision can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the Darkness to fill a 15-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the Darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Bright Light or Dim Light created by a spell of level 2 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
A willing creature you touch shape-shifts, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends on the target if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if it takes a Magic action to end the spell on itself.

While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can't attack or cast spells.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Gaseous Form.name: Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
The target’s only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet, and it can hover. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; it has Immunity to the &Reference[prone apply=false] condition; and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through narrow openings, but it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces.

The target can’t talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. Finally, the target can’t attack or cast spells.

Sleep.name: Sono
Sleep.description:
Cada criatura à sua escolha em uma Esfera de 1,5 metro de raio centrada em um ponto no alcance da magia deve ser bem-sucedida em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição Inconsciente pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Criaturas que não dormem, como elfos, ou que têm Imunidade à condição Exaustão, são automaticamente bem-sucedidas nas salvaguardas contra esta magia.

Sleeping.name: Dormindo
Sleeping.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[incapacitated apply=false] até o final do próximo turno dela, quando deve repetir a salvaguarda. Se o alvo falhar na segunda salvaguarda, ele tem a condição &Reference[unconscious] pela duração da magia. A magia encerra em um alvo se ele sofrer dano ou se alguém a até 1,5 metro dele executar uma ação para sacudi-lo, liberando-o do efeito da magia.

Otyugh.name: Otyugh
Otyugh.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item Bite]] attack and two [[/item Tentacle]] attacks.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition. Whenever the Poisoned target finishes a Long Rest, it is subjected to the following effect.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.formula activity=tKShuY4vDM7tn9aC]].

Failure: The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by [[/damage 1d10 average]] and doesn't return to normal until the Poisoned condition ends on the target.

Success: The Poisoned condition ends.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition. Whenever the Poisoned target finishes a Long Rest, it must make a Constitution Saving Throw or have its Hit Point maximum reduced by [[/damage 1d10 average]] until the Poisoned condition ends.

Tentacle.name: Tentacle

Riposte.name: Riposte
Riposte.description:
Trigger: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon.

Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. On a miss, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one Rapier attack against the triggering creature if within range.

Nota do Foundry

This feature also provides an Active Effect (AE) that will modify this creature's Armor Class when you utilize the reaction. You can enable the AE in the effects tab of the character sheet.

+3 AC.name: +3 AC
+3 AC.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

Diabolical Restoration.name: Diabolical Restoration
Diabolical Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

Fear Aura.name: Fear Aura
Fear Aura.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} emanates an aura in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=oT8238p9jXwVy76c]]-foot Emanation while it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=oT8238p9jXwVy76c]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=oT8238p9jXwVy76c]].

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of its next turn.

Success: The target is immune to this [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s aura for 24 hours.

Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of its next turn.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
