Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, it must make the following saving throw.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=fM7YmQ4hBtRXJkMe]].

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points and takes [[/damage average activity=aa2GUeTEVLOdmfrB]] damage at the start of each of its turns, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition.

Hellfire Spellcasting.name: Hellfire Spellcasting
Hellfire Spellcasting.description: The pit fiend casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireball00]{Fireball} (level 5 version) twice, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]).. It can replace one Fireball with @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldMonste]{Hold Monster} (level 7 version) or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{Wall of Fire}.

Fireball.name: Fireball
Fireball.description:
A bright streak flashes from you to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into a fiery explosion. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried start burning.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

Hold Monster.name: Hold Monster
Hold Monster.description:
Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Paralyzed condition for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 5.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Wall of Fire.name: Wall of Fire
Wall of Fire.description:
You create a wall of fire on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 feet in diameter, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration.

When the wall appears, each creature in its area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d8 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, deals 5d8 Fire damage to each creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of that side or inside the wall. A creature takes the same damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no damage.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 4.

Planetar.name: Planetar
Planetar.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Divine Awareness.name: Divine Awareness
Divine Awareness.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows if it hears a lie.

Exalted Restoration.name: Exalted Restoration
Exalted Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item Radiant Sword]] attacks or uses [[/item Holy Burst]] twice.

Holy Burst.name: Holy Burst
Holy Burst.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=HrgMO1rsQla47fff]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=HrgMO1rsQla47fff]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=HrgMO1rsQla47fff]]-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=HrgMO1rsQla47fff]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplControlWea]{Control Weather}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRaiseDead0]{Raise Dead}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Commune.name: Commune
Commune.description:
You contact a deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question.

Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive "unclear" as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the DM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Control Weather.name: Control Weather
Control Weather.description:
You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you go indoors.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 × 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.

When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.

Precipitation
StageCondition
1Clear
2Light clouds
3Overcast or ground fog
4Rain, hail, or snow
5Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard
Temperature
StageCondition
1Heat wave
2Hot
3Warm
4Cool
5Cold
6Freezing
Wind
StageCondition
1Calm
2Moderate wind
3Strong wind
4Gale
5Storm

Dispel Evil and Good.name: Dispel Evil and Good
Dispel Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good
Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.

Raise Dead.name: Raise Dead
Raise Dead.description:
With a touch, you revive a dead creature if it has been dead no longer than 10 days and it wasn't Undead when it died.

The creature returns to life with 1 Hit Point. This spell also neutralizes any poisons that affected the creature at the time of death.

This spell closes all mortal wounds, but it doesn't restore missing body parts. If the creature is lacking body parts or organs integral for its survival—its head, for instance—the spell automatically fails.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 1)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 2)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 4)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 3)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Divine Aid.name: Divine Aid
Divine Aid.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Curar Ferimentos}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Bless.name: Bênção
Bless.description:
Você abençoa até três criaturas no alcance da magia. Sempre que um alvo realiza uma jogada de ataque ou uma salvaguarda antes que a magia termine, o alvo adiciona 1d4 à jogada de ataque ou salvaguarda.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Blessed.name: Abençoado
Blessed.description: Sempre que um alvo realiza uma jogada de ataque ou uma salvaguarda antes que a magia termine, o alvo adiciona 1d4 à jogada de ataque ou salvaguarda.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Healing Word.name: Palavra Curativa
Healing Word.description:
Uma criatura à sua escolha, à sua vista e no alcance da magia recupera Pontos de Vida iguais a 2d4 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d4 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Cure Wounds.name: Curar Ferimentos
Cure Wounds.description:
Uma criatura que você toca recupera um número de Pontos de Vida igual a 2d8 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

0KRZWGRmZw1gbdm1.name: Lesser Restoration
0KRZWGRmZw1gbdm1.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Remove Curse.name: Remove Curse
Remove Curse.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d4 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Light.name: Luz
Light.description:
Você toca em um objeto Grande ou menor que não está sendo usado ou carregado por outra pessoa. Até que a magia termine, o objeto emite Luz Plena em um raio de 6 metros e meia-luz por mais 6 metros. A luz pode ter a cor que você desejar.

Cobrir o objeto com algo opaco bloqueia a luz. A magia se encerra se você a conjurar novamente.

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Spiritual Weapon.name: Spiritual Weapon
Spiritual Weapon.description:
You create a floating, spectral force that resembles a weapon of your choice and lasts for the duration. The force appears within range in a space of your choice, and you can immediately make one melee spell attack against one creature within 5 feet of the force. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for every slot level above 2.

Holy Symbol.name: Holy Symbol
Holy Symbol.description:
Um Símbolo Sagrado assume uma das formas na tabela Símbolo Sagrado e é adornado ou pintado para canalizar magia divina. Um Clérigo ou Paladino pode usar um Símbolo Sagrado como um Foco de Conjuração.

A tabela indica se um Símbolo Sagrado precisa ser segurado, usado ou exibido em tecido (como um tabardo ou um estandarde) ou em um Escudo.

Símbolos Sagrados
SímboloPesoCusto
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyAmuletworn]{Amuleto} (usado ou segurado)0,5 kg5 PO
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyEmblemborn]{Emblema} (carregado em tecido ou em um escudo)—5 PO
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbhsyReliquaryh]{Relicário} (segurado)1 kg5 PO

Priest Acolyte.name: Priest Acolyte
Priest Acolyte.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{Luz}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia}

Divine Aid.name: Divine Aid
Divine Aid.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplBless00000]{Benção}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHealingWor]{palavra curativa}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Bless.name: Bênção
Bless.description:
Você abençoa até três criaturas no alcance da magia. Sempre que um alvo realiza uma jogada de ataque ou uma salvaguarda antes que a magia termine, o alvo adiciona 1d4 à jogada de ataque ou salvaguarda.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Blessed.name: Abençoado
Blessed.description: Sempre que um alvo realiza uma jogada de ataque ou uma salvaguarda antes que a magia termine, o alvo adiciona 1d4 à jogada de ataque ou salvaguarda.

Healing Word.name: Palavra Curativa
Healing Word.description:
Uma criatura à sua escolha, à sua vista e no alcance da magia recupera Pontos de Vida iguais a 2d4 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d4 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description: You ward a creature within range. Until the spell ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack roll or a damaging spell must succeed on a [[/save ability=wis dc=@attributes.spell.dc format=long]] or either choose a new target or lose the attack or spell. This spell doesn't protect the warded creature from areas of effect. The spell ends if the warded creature makes an attack roll, casts a spell, or deals damage.

Warded.name: Warded
Warded.description:
Until the spell ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack roll or a damaging spell must succeed on a [[/save ability=wis format=long]] or either choose a new target or lose the attack or spell.

The spell ends if the warded creature makes an attack roll, casts a spell, or deals damage.

Light.name: Luz
Light.description:
Você toca em um objeto Grande ou menor que não está sendo usado ou carregado por outra pessoa. Até que a magia termine, o objeto emite Luz Plena em um raio de 6 metros e meia-luz por mais 6 metros. A luz pode ter a cor que você desejar.

Cobrir o objeto com algo opaco bloqueia a luz. A magia se encerra se você a conjurar novamente.

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Holy Symbol.description:
Um Símbolo Sagrado assume uma das formas na tabela Símbolo Sagrado e é adornado ou pintado para canalizar magia divina. Um Clérigo ou Paladino pode usar um Símbolo Sagrado como um Foco de Conjuração.

Pseudodragon.name: Pseudodragon
Pseudodragon.description:
Pseudodragon

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.NhqYPD69TqlVJpKV caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attacks.

Sting.name: Sting
Sting.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the pseudodragon can see within 5 feet.

Failure: 5 (2d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

Failure by 5 or More: While Poisoned, the target also has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour.

Poisoned (Failure 5+).name: Poisoned (Failure 5+)
Poisoned (Failure 5+).description:
The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour.

The Poisoned target also has the &Reference[Unconscious apply=false] condition until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it awake.

Flyby.name: Flyby
Flyby.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} doesn't provoke an &Reference[OpportunityAttacks]{Opportunity Attack} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attack and one [[/item .mmTailStinger000]] attack.

Tunneler.name: Tunneler
Tunneler.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can burrow through solid rock at half its Burrow Speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=xWlMeXFjELfSUWX9]] creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]), and it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the grapple ends.

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained
Grappled & Restrained.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC), and it has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition until the grapple ends.

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]] by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} (it can have up to three creatures swallowed at a time).

Failure: The target is swallowed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and the Grappled conditions end. A swallowed creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and takes [[/damage average activity=zrWNjO9mkbN28spL]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must succeed on a [[/save format=long activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within [[lookup @range.value activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.name: Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover
Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.description: While swallowed, a creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, has Total Cover against attacks.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If you are regurgitated, you fall into a space within 10 ft. and are &Reference[Prone apply=false].

Quasit.name: Quasit
Quasit.description:
Quasit

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.5VW4pbLF5nwdO7II caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Rend.name: Rend
Rend.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}’s next turn.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

32LONl1rUCtttKkg.name: Invisibility
32LONl1rUCtttKkg.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts to resemble a bat (Speed 10 ft., Fly 40 ft.), a centipede (40 ft., Climb 40 ft.), or a toad (40 ft., Swim 40 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Scare.name: Scare
Scare.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=L6pjs2RafI3pF8b3]], one creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=L6pjs2RafI3pF8b3]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Rakshasa.name: Rakshasa
Rakshasa.description:
Rakshasa

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.DMYEpWr3wvK4RLih caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Greater Magic Resistance.name: Greater Magic Resistance
Greater Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s permission, no spell can observe the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

Fiendish Restoration.name: Fiendish Restoration
Fiendish Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside Gehenna, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly and revives with all its Hit Points in Gehenna.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmCursedTouch000]] attacks.

Cursed Touch.name: Cursed Touch
Cursed Touch.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a Short or Long Rest.

Cursed.name: Cursed
Cursed.description: While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a Short or Long Rest.

Baleful Command.name: Baleful Command
Baleful Command.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=SzU2lwdbqgoFMuBM]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=SzU2lwdbqgoFMuBM]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=SzU2lwdbqgoFMuBM]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] and &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] conditions until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Frightened & Incapacitated.name: Frightened & Incapacitated
Frightened & Incapacitated.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] and &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] conditions until the start of the user's next turn.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{Mãos Mágicas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFly0000000]{Fly}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMajorImage]{Major Image}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Mage Hand.name: Mãos Mágicas
Mage Hand.description:
Uma mão espectral flutuante aparece em um ponto que você escolher no alcance da magia. A mão permanece pela duração. A mão desaparece se estiver a mais de 9 metros de você ou se você conjurar esta magia novamente.

Ao conjurar a magia, você pode usar a mão para manipular um objeto, abrir uma porta ou um recipiente destrancado, guardar ou recolher itens de recipientes abertos, ou despejar o conteúdo de um frasco.

Como uma ação Usar Magia em seus próximos turnos, você pode controlar a mão novamente. Como parte dessa ação, você pode mover a mão até 9 metros.

A mão não pode atacar, ativar itens mágicos ou carregar mais de 5 quilos.

Minor Illusion.name: Ilusão Menor
Minor Illusion.description:
Você cria um som ou uma imagem de um objeto no alcance da magia que permanece pela duração da magia. Veja as descrições abaixo para os efeitos de cada um. A ilusão encerra se você conjurar essa magia novamente.

Uma criatura pode perceber a ilusão ao executar a ação estudar para examinar o som ou a imagem e ser bem-sucedida em um teste de [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] contra a CD para evitar sua magia. A ilusão se torna desbotada para uma criatura que consiga discerni-la.

Som. Se você criar um som, o volume pode variar de um sussurro a um grito. Pode ser sua voz, a voz de outra pessoa, o rugido de um leão, o bater de tambores ou qualquer outro som que você escolher. O som continua ininterrupto pela duração da magia, ou você pode criar sons distintos em diferentes momentos antes que a magia termine.

Imagem. Se você criar a imagem de um objeto — como uma cadeira, pegadas enlameadas ou um pequeno baú — ela não pode ter dimensões superiores a um cubo de 1,5 metro de lados. A imagem não pode gerar som, luz, cheiro ou qualquer outro efeito sensorial. A interação física com a imagem demonstra que se trata de uma ilusão, pois os objetos podem atravessá-la.

Fly.name: Fly
Fly.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft unless it can stop the fall.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Major Image.name: Major Image
Major Image.description:
You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot Cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted, but it can't deal damage or cause conditions.

If you are within range of the illusion, you can take a Magic action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, for things can pass through it. A creature that takes a Study action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to the creature.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring Concentration, if cast with a level 4+ spell slot.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Rat.name: Rat
Rat.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Agile.name: Agile
Agile.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} doesn't provoke an &Reference[opportunityattacks]{Opportunity Attack} when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

Raven.name: Raven
Raven.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful [[/check format=long]].

Red Dragon Wyrmling.name: Red Dragon Wyrmling
Red Dragon Wyrmling.description:
Red Dragons

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=YorssyWMumAsvzx3]] by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time).

Failure: The target is swallowed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, it has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and it takes [[/damage average activity=zrWNjO9mkbN28spL]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must succeed on a [[/save format=long activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within [[lookup @range.value activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.name: Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover
Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.description: While swallowed, a creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, has &Reference[Total Cover apply=false] against attacks.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If you are regurgitated, you fall into a space within 10 ft. and are &Reference[Prone apply=false].

[[/attack extended]]. Hit: The target has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the grapple ends.

The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has Grappled when destroyed (AC 20, HP 10, Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Antennae.name: Antennae
Antennae.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} targets one [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=dcSC7EuknnM0uoqY]] object—armor or a weapon—worn or carried by a creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=dcSC7EuknnM0uoqY]] feet of itself.

Failure: The object takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers (armor) or to its attack rolls (weapon). Armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10, and a weapon is destroyed if its penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000] spell on the armor or weapon.

Nota do Foundry

This feature also provides a Damaged Enchantment effect that will modify the targeted object. Due to the fact that the equipment penalty can be applied multiple times, the enchantment needs to be dragged from this item's Effects tab onto the target Item's sheet.

Sea Hag.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can breathe air and water.

Coven Magic.name: Coven Magic
Coven Magic.description: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.int.dc]]): @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAugury0000]{Augury}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Convocar Familiar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{Identificar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLocateObje]{Locate Object}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplUnseenServ]{Unseen Servant}. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

Augury.name: Augury
Augury.description:
You receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses the omen from the Omens table.

OmenFor Results That Will Be …
WealGood
WoeBad
Weal and woeGood and bad
IndifferenceNeither good nor bad

The spell doesn't account for circumstances, such as other spells, that might change the results.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Find Familiar.name: Find Familiar
Find Familiar.description:
You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: Bat, Cat, Frog, Hawk, Lizard, Octopus, Owl, Rat, Raven, Spider, Weasel, or another Beast that has a Challenge Rating of 0. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form (see appendix B), though it is a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend (your choice) instead of a Beast. Your familiar acts independently of you, but it obeys your commands.

Telepathic Connection. While your familiar is within 100 feet of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as a Bonus Action, you can see through the familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special senses it has.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver the touch. Your familiar must be within 100 feet of you, and it must take a Reaction to deliver the touch when you cast the spell.

Combat. The familiar is an ally to you and your allies. It rolls its own Initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.

Disappearance of the Familiar. When the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points, it disappears. It reappears after you cast this spell again. As a Magic action, you can temporarily dismiss the familiar to a pocket dimension. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As a Magic action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you. Whenever the familiar drops to 0 Hit Points or disappears into the pocket dimension, it leaves behind in its space anything it was wearing or carrying.

One Familiar Only. You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new eligible form.

Identify.name: Identify
Identify.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell's casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell's name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.

Locate Object.name: Locate Object
Locate Object.description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location if that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement.

The spell can locate a specific object known to you if you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon.

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.

Unseen Servant.name: Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
This spell creates an Invisible, mindless, shapeless, Medium force that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 Hit Point, and a Strength of 2, and it can't attack. If it drops to 0 Hit Points, the spell ends.

Once on each of your turns as a Bonus Action, you can mentally command the servant to move up to 15 feet and interact with an object. The servant can perform simple tasks that a human could do, such as fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks. Once you give the command, the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until it completes the task, then waits for your next command.

If you command the servant to perform a task that would move it more than 60 feet away from you, the spell ends.

Vile Appearance.name: Vile Appearance
Vile Appearance.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=FR0ETDHBas1Z5LfF]], any [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=FR0ETDHBas1Z5LfF]] that starts its turn within [[lookup @range.value activity=FR0ETDHBas1Z5LfF]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and can see the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s true form.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of its next turn.

Success: The target is immune to this [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Horrific Appearance for 24 hours.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of its next turn.

Death Glare.name: Death Glare
Death Glare.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=3uA75vqvubgY300I]], [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=3uA75vqvubgY300I]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=3uA75vqvubgY300I]] feet.

Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it drops to 0 Hit Points. Otherwise, the target takes [[/damage average]] damage.

Illusory Appearance.name: Illusory Appearance
Illusory Appearance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self}, using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]). The spell's duration is [[lookup @duration.value activity=qY8e7Xm7QYQDXqsd]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=qY8e7Xm7QYQDXqsd]]s.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Charged Tendril.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

Engulf.name: Engulf
Engulf.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=5o0Bh8PQaojx5XMx]], one [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=5o0Bh8PQaojx5XMx]] within 5 feet.

Failure: The target is pulled into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s space and has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]). Until the grapple ends, the target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, and it takes [[/damage average activity=Exfa4q7O4SvXjGt7]] damage at the start of each of its turns. When the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves, the Grappled target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can have only one creature Grappled by this action at a time.

Grappled, Blinded & Restrained.name: Grappled, Blinded & Restrained
Grappled, Blinded & Restrained.description: Until the grapple ends, the target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, and it takes [[/damage average 3d6 type=lightning]] damage at the start of each of its turns.

Shield Guardian.name: Shield Guardian
Shield Guardian.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Bound.name: Bound
Bound.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is magically bound to an amulet. While the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} to travel to it, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

Spell Storing.name: Spell Storing
Spell Storing.description: A spellcaster who wears the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s amulet can cause the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item Fist]] attacks.

Protection.name: Protection
Protection.description:
Trigger: An attack roll hits the wearer of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s amulet while the wearer is within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Response: The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Protected.name: Protected
Protected.description: The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the bestower's next turn.

Shrieker Fungus.name: Shrieker Fungus
Shrieker Fungus.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Shriek.name: Shriek
Shriek.description: Trigger: A [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Tlv3gcYk5KfdtV7c]] or a source of Bright Light moves within [[lookup @range.value activity=Tlv3gcYk5KfdtV7c]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}. Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} emits a shriek audible within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Tlv3gcYk5KfdtV7c]] feet of itself for [[lookup @duration.value activity=Tlv3gcYk5KfdtV7c]] minute or until the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies.

Silver Dragon Wyrmling.name: Silver Dragon Wyrmling
Silver Dragon Wyrmling.description:
Silver Dragons

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.REGxFxNrTLFswtA1 caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Silver Dragon Wyrmling

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.HwVckgQCUMSXFgQx caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmRend0000000000]] attacks.

Cold Breath.name: Cold Breath
Cold Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]]-foot Cone.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Paralyzing Breath.name: Paralyzing Breath
Paralyzing Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=r4MGqEq5U9aaseBh]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=r4MGqEq5U9aaseBh]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=r4MGqEq5U9aaseBh]]-foot Cone.

First Failure: The target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save.

Second Failure: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Incapacitated.name: Incapacitated
Incapacitated.description: The target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Skeleton.name: Skeleton
Skeleton.description:
Skeletons

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.w1RMyPzpjolhQMVX caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Slaad Tadpole.description:
Slaadi

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.AXXqca9xNbd6xnJ6 caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]
