Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Solar.name: Solar
Solar.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Divine Awareness.name: Divine Awareness
Divine Awareness.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows if it hears a lie.

Exalted Restoration.name: Exalted Restoration
Exalted Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item Flying Sword]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item Slaying Bow]].

Slaying Bow.name: Slaying Bow
Slaying Bow.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] [[lookup @range.units activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]].

Failure: If the [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=C7BMf8hIfCjxRSWC]] has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes [[/damage average]] damage.

Flying Sword.name: Flying Sword
Flying Sword.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. Hit or Miss: The sword magically returns to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s hand or hovers within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} immediately after a ranged attack.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplControlWea]{Control Weather}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplResurrecti]{Resurrection}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Commune.name: Commune
Commune.description:
You contact a deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question.

Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive "unclear" as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the DM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead.

If you cast the spell more than once before finishing a Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer.

Control Weather.name: Control Weather
Control Weather.description:
You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you go indoors.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 × 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.

When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.

Precipitation
StageCondition
1Clear
2Light clouds
3Overcast or ground fog
4Rain, hail, or snow
5Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard
Temperature
StageCondition
1Heat wave
2Hot
3Warm
4Cool
5Cold
6Freezing
Wind
StageCondition
1Calm
2Moderate wind
3Strong wind
4Gale
5Storm

Dispel Evil and Good.name: Dispel Evil and Good
Dispel Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good
Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.

Resurrection.name: Resurrection
Resurrection.description:
With a touch, you revive a dead creature that has been dead for no more than a century, didn't die of old age, and wasn't Undead when it died.

The creature returns to life with all its Hit Points. This spell also neutralizes any poisons that affected the creature at the time of death. This spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Casting this spell to revive a creature that has been dead for 365 days or longer taxes you. Until you finish a Long Rest, you can't cast spells again, and you have Disadvantage on D20 Tests.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 1)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 1).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 2)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 2).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 3)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 3).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).name: Resurrection Sickness (Day 4)
Resurrection Sickness (Day 4).description: Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. The target takes a −4 penalty to D20 Tests. Every time the target finishes a Long Rest, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it becomes 0.

Spell Taxed.name: Spell Taxed
Spell Taxed.description: Until you finish a Long Rest, you can’t cast spells again, and you have Disadvantage on D20 Tests.

Blinding Gaze.name: Blinding Gaze
Blinding Gaze.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=B6xM8C2pABIb5o7y]], one creature the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=B6xM8C2pABIb5o7y]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition for 1 minute.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Radiant Teleport.name: Radiant Teleport
Radiant Teleport.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=HtsFBK1PYKjvy9mn]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} at its destination space.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Divine Aid.name: Divine Aid
Divine Aid.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Curar Ferimentos} (level 2 version), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Cure Wounds.name: Curar Ferimentos
Cure Wounds.description:
Uma criatura que você toca recupera um número de Pontos de Vida igual a 2d8 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Remove Curse.name: Remove Curse
Remove Curse.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Specter.name: Specter
Specter.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Incorporeal Movement.name: Incorporeal Movement
Incorporeal Movement.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move through other creatures and objects as if they were &Reference[Difficult Terrain]. It takes [[/damage 1d10 average type=force]] damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

Sunlight Sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Sunlight Sensitivity.description: While in sunlight, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

Life Drain.name: Life Drain
Life Drain.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

Sphinx of Lore.name: Sphinx of Lore
Sphinx of Lore.description:
Sphinxes

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.JPdmXY7WGZdIPlJo caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Inscrutable.name: Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description: No magic can observe the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item Claw]] attacks.

Mind-Rending Roar.name: Mind-Rending Roar
Mind-Rending Roar.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=zPMfwwIoTFzIrN5H]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Incapacitated.name: Incapacitated
Incapacitated.description: The target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature's next turn.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{Identificar}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{Mãos Mágicas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitação Arcana}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLegendLore]{Legend Lore}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLocateObje]{Locate Object}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPlaneShift]{Plane Shift}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplTongues000]{Tongues}

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Identify.name: Identify
Identify.description:
You touch an object throughout the spell's casting. If the object is a magic item or some other magical object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any ongoing spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn that spell's name.

If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn which ongoing spells, if any, are currently affecting it.

Mage Hand.name: Mãos Mágicas
Mage Hand.description:
Uma mão espectral flutuante aparece em um ponto que você escolher no alcance da magia. A mão permanece pela duração. A mão desaparece se estiver a mais de 9 metros de você ou se você conjurar esta magia novamente.

Ao conjurar a magia, você pode usar a mão para manipular um objeto, abrir uma porta ou um recipiente destrancado, guardar ou recolher itens de recipientes abertos, ou despejar o conteúdo de um frasco.

Como uma ação Usar Magia em seus próximos turnos, você pode controlar a mão novamente. Como parte dessa ação, você pode mover a mão até 9 metros.

A mão não pode atacar, ativar itens mágicos ou carregar mais de 5 quilos.

Minor Illusion.name: Ilusão Menor
Minor Illusion.description:
Você cria um som ou uma imagem de um objeto no alcance da magia que permanece pela duração da magia. Veja as descrições abaixo para os efeitos de cada um. A ilusão encerra se você conjurar essa magia novamente.

Uma criatura pode perceber a ilusão ao executar a ação estudar para examinar o som ou a imagem e ser bem-sucedida em um teste de [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] contra a CD para evitar sua magia. A ilusão se torna desbotada para uma criatura que consiga discerni-la.

Som. Se você criar um som, o volume pode variar de um sussurro a um grito. Pode ser sua voz, a voz de outra pessoa, o rugido de um leão, o bater de tambores ou qualquer outro som que você escolher. O som continua ininterrupto pela duração da magia, ou você pode criar sons distintos em diferentes momentos antes que a magia termine.

Imagem. Se você criar a imagem de um objeto — como uma cadeira, pegadas enlameadas ou um pequeno baú — ela não pode ter dimensões superiores a um cubo de 1,5 metro de lados. A imagem não pode gerar som, luz, cheiro ou qualquer outro efeito sensorial. A interação física com a imagem demonstra que se trata de uma ilusão, pois os objetos podem atravessá-la.

Prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitação Arcana
Prestidigitation.description:
Você cria um efeito mágico dentro da distância da magia. Escolha o efeito dentre as opções abaixo. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter três de seus efeitos não instantâneos ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Efeito Sensorial. Você cria um efeito sensorial instantâneo e inofensivo, como uma chuva de faíscas, um sopro de vento, notas musicais suaves ou um odor estranho.

Brincar com Fogo. Você instantaneamente acende ou apaga uma vela, uma tocha ou uma pequena fogueira.

Limpo ou sujo. Você limpa ou suja instantaneamente um objeto com menos de 30 centímetros de lado.

Sensação Menor. Você esfria, aquece ou dá sabor a um material não vivo com menos de 30 centímetros cúbicos por 1 hora.

Marca Mágica Você faz aparecer uma cor, uma pequena marca ou um símbolo em um objeto ou superfície por 1 hora.

Criação Menor. Você cria uma bugiganga não mágica ou uma imagem ilusória que caiba em sua mão. Ela dura até o fim do seu próximo turno. Uma bugiganga não pode causar dano e não tem valor monetário.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Legend Lore.name: Legend Lore
Legend Lore.description:
Name or describe a famous person, place, or object. The spell brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about that famous thing, as described by the DM.

The lore might consist of important details, amusing revelations, or even secret lore that has never been widely known. The more information you already know about the thing, the more precise and detailed the information you receive is. That information is accurate but might be couched in figurative language or poetry, as determined by the DM.

If the famous thing you chose isn't actually famous, you hear sad musical notes played on a trombone, and the spell fails.

Locate Object.name: Locate Object
Locate Object.description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location if that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement.

The spell can locate a specific object known to you if you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon.

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.

Plane Shift.name: Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination, as determined by the DM.

Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane of existence, this spell can take you to that circle. If the teleportation circle is too small to hold all the creatures you transported, they appear in the closest unoccupied spaces next to the circle.

Remove Curse.name: Remove Curse
Remove Curse.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's Attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Tongues.name: Tongues
Tongues.description: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand any spoken or signed language that it hears or sees. Moreover, when the target communicates by speaking or signing, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it if that creature can hear the speech or see the signing.

Arcane Prowl.name: Arcane Prowl
Arcane Prowl.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can teleport up to [[lookup @range.value activity=a3RqyzU0UqzLJif0]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one [[/item Claw]] attack.

Weight of Years.name: Weight of Years
Weight of Years.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] feet.

Failure: The target gains 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears [[/r 3d10]] years older.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Sphinx of Valor.name: Sphinx of Valor
Sphinx of Valor.description:
Sphinxes

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.JPdmXY7WGZdIPlJo caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Inscrutable.name: Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description: No magic can observe the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item Claw]] attacks and uses [[/item Roar]].

Roar.name: Roar
Roar.description:
The sphinx emits a magical roar. Whenever it roars, the roar has a different effect, as detailed below (the sequence resets when it takes a Long Rest):

First Roar.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]], each enemy in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition for [[lookup @duration.value activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=Igeu89TALGlNPXDg]].

Second Roar.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After [[lookup @duration.value activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]] [[lookup @duration.units activity=uFTndQPvULZVHT9R]], it succeeds automatically.

Third Roar.

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Success: [[lookup @damage.onSave capitalize activity=Td8ArIMDfxWDLbE9]] damage only.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition for 1 minute.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHeroesFeas]{Heroes' Feast}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplZoneofTrut]{Zone of Truth}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Thaumaturgy.name: Taumaturgia
Thaumaturgy.description:
Você manifesta uma pequena maravilha dentro do alcance da magia. Crie um dos efeitos abaixo dentro da distância da magia. Se você conjurar esta magia várias vezes, é possível ter até três de seus efeitos de 1 minuto ativos ao mesmo tempo.

Brincar com Fogo. Você faz chamas tremularem, clarearem, escurecerem ou mudarem de cor por 1 minuto.

Mão Invisível. Você instantaneamente faz uma porta ou janela destrancada se abrir repentinamente ou fechar com uma batida.

Olhos Alterados. Você altera a aparência dos seus olhos por 1 minuto.

Som Fantasmagórico. Você cria um som instantâneo que se origina em um ponto à sua escolha no alcance da magia, como um estrondo de trovão, o gralhar de um corvo ou sussurros sinistros.

Tremores. Você causa tremores inofensivos no chão por 1 minuto.

Voz Trovejante. Sua voz aumenta até três vezes mais do que o normal por 1 minuto. Pela duração da magia, você tem Vantagem em testes de [[/check ability=cha skill=itm]].

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Greater Restoration.name: Greater Restoration
Greater Restoration.description:
You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it:

  • 1 &Reference[Exhaustion] level
  • The &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Petrified] condition
  • A curse, including the target's Attunement to a cursed magic item
  • Any reduction to one of the target's ability scores
  • Any reduction to the target's Hit Point maximum

Heroes' Feast.name: Heroes' Feast
Heroes' Feast.description:
You conjure a feast that appears on a surface in an unoccupied 10-foot Cube next to you. The feast takes 1 hour to consume and disappears at the end of that time, and the beneficial effects don't set in until this hour is over. Up to twelve creatures can partake of the feast.

A creature that partakes gains several benefits, which last for 24 hours. The creature has &Reference[damageResistance]{Resistance} to Poison damage, and it has Immunity to the &Reference[Frightened] and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions. Its Hit Point maximum also increases by 2d10, and it gains the same number of Hit Points.

Feast's Benefits.name: Feast's Benefits
Feast's Benefits.description: The creature has &Reference[damageResistance]{Resistance} to Poison damage, and it has Immunity to the &Reference[Frightened] and &Reference[Poisoned] conditions. Its Hit Point maximum also increases by 2d10, and it gains the same number of Hit Points.

Zone of Truth.name: Zone of Truth
Zone of Truth.description:
You create a magical zone that guards against deception in a 15-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, a creature that enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a creature can't speak a deliberate lie while in the radius. You know whether a creature succeeds or fails on this save.

An affected creature is aware of the spell and can avoid answering questions to which it would normally respond with a lie. Such a creature can be evasive yet must be truthful.

Cannot Lie.name: Cannot Lie
Cannot Lie.description:
On a failed save, a creature can’t speak a deliberate lie while in the radius. You know whether a creature succeeds or fails on this save.

An affected creature is aware of the spell and can avoid answering questions to which it would normally respond with a lie. Such a creature can be evasive yet must be truthful.

Arcane Prowl.name: Arcane Prowl
Arcane Prowl.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can teleport up to [[lookup @range.value activity=a3RqyzU0UqzLJif0]] feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one [[/item Claw]] attack.

Weight of Years.name: Weight of Years
Weight of Years.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=xZul1ImCP658OBv3]] feet.

Failure: The target gains 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears [[/r 3d10]] years older.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Sphinx of Wonder.name: Sphinx of Wonder
Sphinx of Wonder.description:
Sphinxes

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.JPdmXY7WGZdIPlJo caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Sphinx of Wonder

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.knvt7pCk5slbRRf0 caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Burst of Ingenuity.name: Burst of Ingenuity
Burst of Ingenuity.description: Trigger: The [[lookup @name]]{monster} or another creature within [[lookup @range.value activity=AyYipNx3cFaXA0LU]] feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. Response: The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.

Spider.name: Spider
Spider.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Web Walker.name: Web Walker
Web Walker.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

Spirit Naga.name: Spirit Naga
Spirit Naga.description:
Spirit Naga

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.SYPUI0R76sVilXaV caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Fiendish Restoration.name: Fiendish Restoration
Fiendish Restoration.description: If it dies, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} returns to life in [[/r 1d6]] days and regains all its Hit Points. Only a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] or [[/item .mmNecroticRay000]] in any combination.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{Mãos Mágicas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWaterBreat]{Water Breathing}

2/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{Detect Thoughts}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDimensionD]{Dimension Door}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person} (level 3), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLightningB]{Lightning Bolt} (level 4)

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Mage Hand.name: Mãos Mágicas
Mage Hand.description:
Uma mão espectral flutuante aparece em um ponto que você escolher no alcance da magia. A mão permanece pela duração. A mão desaparece se estiver a mais de 9 metros de você ou se você conjurar esta magia novamente.

Ao conjurar a magia, você pode usar a mão para manipular um objeto, abrir uma porta ou um recipiente destrancado, guardar ou recolher itens de recipientes abertos, ou despejar o conteúdo de um frasco.

Como uma ação Usar Magia em seus próximos turnos, você pode controlar a mão novamente. Como parte dessa ação, você pode mover a mão até 9 metros.

A mão não pode atacar, ativar itens mágicos ou carregar mais de 5 quilos.

Minor Illusion.name: Ilusão Menor
Minor Illusion.description:
Você cria um som ou uma imagem de um objeto no alcance da magia que permanece pela duração da magia. Veja as descrições abaixo para os efeitos de cada um. A ilusão encerra se você conjurar essa magia novamente.

Uma criatura pode perceber a ilusão ao executar a ação estudar para examinar o som ou a imagem e ser bem-sucedida em um teste de [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] contra a CD para evitar sua magia. A ilusão se torna desbotada para uma criatura que consiga discerni-la.

Som. Se você criar um som, o volume pode variar de um sussurro a um grito. Pode ser sua voz, a voz de outra pessoa, o rugido de um leão, o bater de tambores ou qualquer outro som que você escolher. O som continua ininterrupto pela duração da magia, ou você pode criar sons distintos em diferentes momentos antes que a magia termine.

Imagem. Se você criar a imagem de um objeto — como uma cadeira, pegadas enlameadas ou um pequeno baú — ela não pode ter dimensões superiores a um cubo de 1,5 metro de lados. A imagem não pode gerar som, luz, cheiro ou qualquer outro efeito sensorial. A interação física com a imagem demonstra que se trata de uma ilusão, pois os objetos podem atravessá-la.

Water Breathing.name: Water Breathing
Water Breathing.description: This spell grants up to ten willing creatures of your choice within range the ability to breathe underwater until the spell ends. Affected creatures also retain their normal mode of respiration.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Dimension Door.name: Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
You teleport to a location within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 feet straight downward" or "300 feet upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle."

You can also teleport one willing creature. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you teleport, and it teleports to a space within 5 feet of your destination space.

If you, the other creature, or both would arrive in a space occupied by a creature or completely filled by one or more objects, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 Force damage, and the teleportation fails.

Hold Person.name: Hold Person
Hold Person.description:
Choose a Humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[paralyzed apply=false] condition for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional Humanoid for each spell slot level above 2.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

Sprite.name: Sprite
Sprite.description:
Sprite

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.V6OhuMIts22zPe8X caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Enchanting Bow.name: Enchanting Bow
Enchanting Bow.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Charmed.name: Enfeitiçado
Charmed.description: The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the start of the attacking creature's next turn.

Heart Sight.name: Heart Sight
Heart Sight.description:
Charisma Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=NqVrZShDV1L3zBA3]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=NqVrZShDV1L3zBA3]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=NqVrZShDV1L3zBA3]] feet the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save).

Failure: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} knows the target's emotions and alignment.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

FAek73jM5CyQOO60.name: Invisibility
FAek73jM5CyQOO60.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Spy.name: Spy
Spy.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Cunning Action.name: Cunning Action
Cunning Action.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes the &Reference[Dash apply=false], the &Reference[Disengage apply=false], or &Reference[Hide apply=false] action.

Thieves' Tools.name: Ferramentas de Ladrão
Thieves' Tools.description:
Atributo: Destreza

Usar: Arrombar uma fechadura (CD 15) ou desarmar uma armadilha (CD 15)

Steam Mephit.name: Steam Mephit
Steam Mephit.description:
Mephits

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.C5AnYUB2Vhu0urqS caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Steam Mephit

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.G3d4GDT0FWo30AdL caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm free-rules-embed"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Blurred Form.name: Blurred Form
Blurred Form.description: Attack rolls against the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} are made with Disadvantage unless the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has the Incapacitated condition.

Death Burst.name: Death Burst
Death Burst.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} explodes [[lookup @activation.condition activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]].

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=1SfqWSp7RSyHgG4b]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=5iI1KQRWrdMGh9sy]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=5iI1KQRWrdMGh9sy]]-foot Cone.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} next turn..

Success: Half damage.

Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

Stirge.name: Stirge
Stirge.description:
Stirges

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.XvhPdtq14MUqgYVO caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Stirge

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Proboscis.name: Proboscis
Proboscis.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a creature, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} attaches to the target. While attached, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes [[/damage average activity=5xwoPMBiaRBqjFav]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} as an action.

Stone Giant.name: Stone Giant
Stone Giant.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two attacks, using [[/item .mmStoneClub00000]] or [[/item .mmBoulder0000000]] in any combination.

Boulder.name: Boulder
Boulder.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Deflect Missile.name: Deflect Missile
Deflect Missile.description:
Trigger: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is [[lookup @activation.condition activity=9T8cNbSBVACrrmRI]].

Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} reduces the damage it takes from the attack by [[/healing average]], and if that damage is reduced to 0, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can redirect some of the attack's force.

Slow.name: Slow

rHwlDG85kUcrUFdg.name: Slow
rHwlDG85kUcrUFdg.description:
You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot Cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by this spell for the duration.

An affected target's Speed is halved, it takes a −2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can't take Reactions. On its turns, it can take either an action or a Bonus Action, not both, and it can make only one attack if it takes the Attack action. If it casts a spell with a Somatic component, there is a [[/r 1d100cs<=25#Slowed spell cast success]]{25 percent} chance the spell fails as a result of the target making the spell's gestures too slowly.

An affected target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Nota do Foundry

The inline roll above will return 1 if it succeeded or 0 if it failed.

Slowed.name: Desacelerado

An affected target’s Speed is halved, it takes a −2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can’t take Reactions. If it casts a spell with a Somatic component, there is a [[/r 1d100cs>25#Slowed spell cast success]]{25 percent} chance the spell fails as a result of the target making the spell’s gestures too slowly.

An affected target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{Luz}

1/Day: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplControlWea]{Control Weather}

Detect Magic.name: Detectar Magia
Detect Magic.description:
Pela duração da magia, você sente a presença de efeitos mágicos a até 9 metros de você. Se você sentir tais efeitos, pode realizar uma ação mágica para ver uma aura fraca ao redor de qualquer criatura ou objeto visível na área que contém a magia, e se um efeito foi criado por uma magia, você descobre a escola dessa magia.

A magia é bloqueada por 30 centímetros de pedra, terra ou madeira, 2,5 centímetros de metal ou uma folha fina de chumbo.

Light.name: Luz
Light.description:
Você toca em um objeto Grande ou menor que não está sendo usado ou carregado por outra pessoa. Até que a magia termine, o objeto emite Luz Plena em um raio de 6 metros e meia-luz por mais 6 metros. A luz pode ter a cor que você desejar.

Cobrir o objeto com algo opaco bloqueia a luz. A magia se encerra se você a conjurar novamente.

Control Weather.name: Control Weather
Control Weather.description:
You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you go indoors.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 × 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.

When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.

Precipitation
StageCondition
1Clear
2Light clouds
3Overcast or ground fog
4Rain, hail, or snow
5Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard
Temperature
StageCondition
1Heat wave
2Hot
3Warm
4Cool
5Cold
6Freezing
Wind
StageCondition
1Calm
2Moderate wind
3Strong wind
4Gale
5Storm

Failure or Success: The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except its Fly Speed is available only in its true form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Dominate Person.name: Dominate Person
Dominate Person.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. The target has Advantage on the save if you or your allies are fighting it. Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

You have a telepathic link with the Charmed target while the two of you are on the same plane of existence. On your turn, you can use this link to issue commands to the target (no action required), such as "Attack that creature," "Move over there," or "Fetch that object." The target does its best to obey on its turn. If it completes an order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it acts and moves as it likes, focusing on protecting itself.

You can command the target to take a Reaction but must take your own Reaction to do so.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Your Concentration can last longer with a spell slot of level 6 (up to 10 minutes), 7 (up to 1 hour), or 8+ (up to 8 hours).

Dominated.name: Dominated
Dominated.description: Whenever the &Reference[charmed apply=false] target takes damage, it repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Failure: The target is swallowed, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions and can't teleport, it has &Reference[Total Cover] against attacks and other effects outside the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}, and takes [[/damage average activity=zrWNjO9mkbN28spL]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns.

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} must succeed on a [[/save format=long activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within [[lookup @range.value activity=rGeGukkm2t2fXsoy]] feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.name: Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover
Blinded, Restrained, and Total Cover.description: While swallowed, a creature has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] and &Reference[Restrained apply=false] conditions, has &Reference[Total Cover apply=false] against attacks.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: If you are regurgitated, you fall into a space within 10 ft. and are &Reference[Prone apply=false].

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same initiative count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.

Loathsome Limbs.name: Loathsome Limbs
Loathsome Limbs.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} ends any turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}l's limbs is severed, falls into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s space, and becomes a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmTrollLimb00000]{Troll Limb}. The limb acts immediately after the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains Hit Points.

Nota do Foundry

This feature provides an Active Effect condition in the character sheet's Effects tab to enable each level of Exhaustion. Since the condition can be applied multiple times, the GM must manually manage the level of Exhaustion. There is an active effect available for each level of exhaustion.

Exhaustion 1.name: Exhaustion 1
Exhaustion 1.description: The creature has 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level for each missing limb.

Exhaustion 5.description: The creature has 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level for each missing limb.

Exhaustion Dead.name: Exhaustion Dead
Exhaustion Dead.description: The creature has 1 &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false] level for each missing limb.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmRend0000000000]] attacks.

Charge.name: Charge
Charge.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to [[lookup @range.special activity=Y2IncZu5BjB42z7l]] straight toward an enemy it can see.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

Troll Spawn.name: Troll Spawn
Troll Spawn.description: The limb uncannily has the same senses as a whole [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}. If the limb isn't destroyed within 24 hours, roll [[/r 1d12#On a 12, the limb turns into a troll]]{roll 1d12}. On a 12, the limb turns into a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmTroll000000000]{Troll}. Otherwise, the limb withers away.

Tyrannosaurus Rex.name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
Tyrannosaurus Rex.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item .mmBite0000000000]] attack and one [[/item .mmTail0000000000]] attack.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]])). While Grappled, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=falsse] condition and can't be targeted by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s Tail.

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained
Grappled & Restrained.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC). While Grappled, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=falsse] condition.

Tail.name: Tail
Tail.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Prone.name: Caído
Prone.description: The target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Unicorn.name: Unicorn
Unicorn.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes one [[/item Hooves]] attack and one [[/item Radiant Horn]] attack.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Arte druídica}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCalmEmotio]{Calm Emotions}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEntangle00]{Entangle}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Passo sem Rastro}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWordofReca]{Word of Recall}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Druidcraft.name: Arte Druídica
Druidcraft.description:
Sussurrando para os espíritos da natureza, você cria um dos seguintes efeitos no alcance da magia.

Sensor Meterológico. Você cria um efeito sensorial minúsculo e inofensivo que prevê qual será o clima no local onde você está pelas próximas 24 horas. O efeito pode se manifestar como uma esfera dourada para céu claro, uma nuvem para chuva, flocos de neve caindo para neve e assim por diante. Esse efeito persiste por 1 rodada.

Florescer. Você instantaneamente faz uma flor desabrochar, uma vagem se abrir ou um botão de folha se abrir.

Efeito Sensorial. Você cria um efeito sensorial inofensivo, como folhas caindo, fadas dançantes espectrais, uma brisa suave, o som de um animal ou o leve odor de gambá. O efeito deve caber em um Cubo de 1,5 metro de lado.

Brincar com Fogo. Você acende ou apaga uma vela, uma tocha ou uma fogueira.

Calm Emotions.name: Calm Emotions
Calm Emotions.description:
Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects (choose for each creature):

  • The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration.
  • The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it's Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal.

Calmed.name: Calmed
Calmed.description: The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration.

Indifference.name: Indifference
Indifference.description: The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it’s Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature’s attitude returns to normal.

Dispel Evil and Good.name: Dispel Evil and Good
Dispel Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good
Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.

Entangle.name: Entangle
Entangle.description:
Grasping plants sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into &Reference[difficultterrain]. They disappear when the spell ends.

Each creature (other than you) in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Pass without Trace.name: Pass without Trace
Pass without Trace.description: You radiate a concealing aura in a 30-foot Emanation for the duration. While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Concealed.name: Concealed
Concealed.description: While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Word of Recall.name: Word of Recall
Word of Recall.description:
You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You and any creatures that teleport with you appear in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary (see below). If you cast this spell without first preparing a sanctuary, the spell has no effect.

You must designate a location, such as a temple, as a sanctuary by casting this spell there.

Charging Horn.name: Charging Horn
Charging Horn.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to half its Speed without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks], and it makes one [[/item Radiant Horn]] attack.

Shimmering Shield.name: Shimmering Shield
Shimmering Shield.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} targets itself or one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] feet of itself. The target gains [[/healing average temp]], and its AC increases by 2 until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s' next turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Shielded.name: Shielded
Shielded.description: The target's AC increases by 2 until the end of the bestower's next turn.

Unicorn's Blessing.name: Unicorn's Blessing
Unicorn's Blessing.description: The [[lookup @name]]{monster} touches another creature with its horn and casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Curar Ferimentos} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration} on that creature, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Cure Wounds.name: Curar Ferimentos
Cure Wounds.description:
Uma criatura que você toca recupera um número de Pontos de Vida igual a 2d8 mais seu modificador de atributo de conjuração.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. A cura aumenta em 2d8 para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Vampire.name: Vampire
Vampire.description:
Vampires

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.y4ooBM6PNZfWH3Tv caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Misty Escape.name: Misty Escape
Misty Escape.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} drops to 0 Hit Points outside its resting place, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 Hit Points in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Multiattack (Vampire Form Only).name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
Multiattack (Vampire Form Only).description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attacks and uses [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}.

Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only).name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)
Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only).description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of two hands.

Grappled.name: Agarrado
Grappled.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC) from one of two hands.

Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only).name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only).description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] feet [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains Hit Points equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmVampireSpawn00]{Vampire Spawn} under the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s control.

Charm.name: Charm
Charm.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCharmPerso], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]), and the duration is [[lookup @duration.value activity=fcRXSTOlFJShCl52]] hours. The &Reference[Charmed apply=false] target is a willing recipient of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Charm Person.name: Enfeitiçar Pessoa
Charm Person.description:
Um Humanoide à sua vista e no alcance da magia realiza uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria. Ele tem Vantagem se você ou seus aliados estiverem lutando contra ele. Se falhar, o alvo tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] até que a magia termine ou até que você ou seus aliados causem dano a ele. A criatura Enfeitiçada é Amigável a você. Quando a magia termina, o alvo sabe que foi Enfeitiçado por você.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher uma criatura adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Charmed.name: Enfeitiçado
Charmed.description: O alvo tem a condição &Reference[charmed apply=false] até que a magia termine ou até que você ou seus aliados causem dano a ele. A criatura Enfeitiçada é Amigável a você. Quando a magia termina, o alvo sabe que foi Enfeitiçado por você.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a Tiny @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmBat00000000000]{bat} (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in bat form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and Speed, are unchanged.

While in mist form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has Resistance to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

Beguile.name: Beguile
Beguile.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommand000], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]). The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Command.name: Comando
Command.description:
Você profere uma palavra única de comando para uma criatura à sua vista e no alcance da magia. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em uma salvaguarda de Sabedoria ou segue o comando no próximo turno dele. Escolha o comando a partir destas opções:

Abaixar. O alvo tem a condição Caído e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Aproximar. O alvo se move em sua direção pela rota mais curta e direta, terminando o turno dele se ele se mover a até 1,5 metro de você.

Fugir. O alvo usa o próprio turno se afastando de você pelos meios mais rápidos disponíveis.

Largar.O alvo solta o que estiver segurando e, em seguida, termina o turno.

Parar. No turno do alvo, ele não se move e não executa nenhuma ação ou Ação Bônus.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. Você pode escolher um efeito adicional para cada círculo de espaço de magia acima de 1.

Deathless Strike.name: Deathless Strike
Deathless Strike.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attack.

Vampire Weakness.name: Vampire Weakness
Vampire Weakness.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has these weaknesses:

Forbiddance. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

Running Water. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

Stake to the Heart. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s heart while the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has the Incapacitated condition.

Sunlight. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

Disadv. Attacks & Checks.name: Disadv. Attacks & Checks
Disadv. Attacks & Checks.description: While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

Vampire Familiar.name: Vampire Familiar
Vampire Familiar.description:
Vampires

Vampiric Connection.name: Vampiric Connection
Vampiric Connection.description: While the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and its vampire master are on the same plane of existence, the vampire can communicate with the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} telepathically, and the vampire can perceive through the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s senses.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmUmbralDagger00]] attacks.

Umbral Dagger.name: Umbral Dagger
Umbral Dagger.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack, the target becomes Stable but has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour. While it has the Poisoned condition, the target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition.

Poisoned & Paralyzed.name: Poisoned & Paralyzed
Poisoned & Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour. While the target has the Poisoned condition, the target also has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition.

Deathless Agility.name: Deathless Agility
Deathless Agility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes the &Reference[Dash] or &Reference[Disengage] action.

Demonic Restoration.name: Demonic Restoration
Demonic Restoration.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmShred000000000]] attacks.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=voqQeTnihpy3BTFf]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=voqQeTnihpy3BTFf]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. While Poisoned, the target takes [[/damage average activity=ukZveNVmvvtwbDj0]] at the start of each of its turns. Emptying a flask of Holy Water on the target ends the effect early.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=eoIikvnPayaj02oN]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=eoIikvnPayaj02oN]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} (demons succeed automatically).

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.

Stunned.name: Stunned
Stunned.description: The target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false]] condition until the end of the vrock’s next turn.

Vulture.name: Vulture

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

Warhorse.name: Warhorse
Warhorse.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.
