Whelm.name: Whelm
Whelm.description:
Strength Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=TQchFj2VXXJgU7Lq]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=TQchFj2VXXJgU7Lq]] in the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s space.

Failure: [[/damage average activity=TQchFj2VXXJgU7Lq]] damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]). Until the grapple ends, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, is &Reference[suffocating]{suffocating} unless it can breathe water, and takes [[/damage average activity=khxVwH3AB0sx1qRG]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can grapple one Large creature or up to two Medium or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm.

As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can pull a creature out of it by succeeding on a [[/check ath dc=@skills.ath.passive format=long]].

Success: Half damage only.

Grappled & Restrained.name: Grappled & Restrained
Grappled & Restrained.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (see source item for the escape DC). Until the grapple ends, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, is &Reference[Suffocating]{suffocating} unless it can breathe water, and takes damage (see source for damage) at the start of each of the attacking creature's turns.

The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} shape-shifts into a Large bear-humanoid hybrid form or a Large bear, or it returns to its true humanoid form, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Nota do Foundry

This feature also provides an Active Effect (AE) that will modify this creature's speed in bear form. You can enable the AE in the effects tab of the character sheet.

Undead Fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
Undead Fortitude.description: If damage reduces the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: At the start of each of its turns, the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target repeats the [[/save ability=dex]] save. On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

Pack Damage.name: Pack Damage
Pack Damage.description: Whenever the pack moves within 10 feet of a creature you can see and whenever a creature you can see enters a space within 10 feet of the pack or ends its turn there, you can force that creature to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 3d10 Slashing damage. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 2d12 + 3 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 2d6 + 3 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Shared Resistances.name: Shared Resistances
Shared Resistances.description:
When you summon the spirit, choose one of its Resistances. You have &Reference[damageresistance]{Resistance} to the chosen damage type until the spell ends.

Nota do Foundry

Active effects and activities applying those effects on this item are provided for optional application of the chosen resistance.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description:
The spirit makes a number of [[/item Rend]] attacks equal to half the spell's level (round down), and it uses [[/item Breath Weapon]].

[[floor(@flags.dnd5e.summon.level / 2)]]{Number of attacks}

Rend.name: Rend
Rend.description: Melee Attack: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 10 feet. Hit: 1d6 + 4 + the spell's level Piercing damage.

Breath Weapon.name: Sopro
Breath Weapon.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC equals your spell save DC, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 2d6 damage of a type this spirit has Resistance to (your choice when you cast the spell). Success: Half damage.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: At the start of each of your turns, the hound attempts to bite one enemy within 5 feet of it. That enemy must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8 Force damage.

Spider Climb.description: The insect can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Multiattack.description:
The insect makes a number of attacks equal to half this spell's level (round down).

[[floor(@flags.dnd5e.summon.level / 2)]]{Number of attacks}

Poison Jab.name: Poison Jab
Poison Jab.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 10 ft. Hit: 1d6 + 3 plus the spell's level Piercing damage plus 1d4 Poison damage.

Web Bolt.name: Web Bolt
Web Bolt.description: Ranged Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, range 60 ft. Hit: 1d10 + 3 plus the spell's level Bludgeoning damage, and the target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of the insect's next turn.

Webbed.name: Webbed
Webbed.description: The target’s Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of the insect’s next turn.

Venomous Spew.name: Venomous Spew
Venomous Spew.description: Constitution Saving Throw: Your spell save DC, one creature the insect can see within 10 feet. Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the insect's next turn.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the insect’s next turn.

Life Bond.name: Life Bond
Life Bond.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

Otherworldly Slam.name: Otherworldly Slam
Otherworldly Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 plus the spell's level of Radiant (Celestial), Psychic (Fey), or Necrotic (Fiend) damage.

Fell Glare.name: Fell Glare
Fell Glare.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC equals your spell save DC, one creature within 60 feet the steed can see. Failure: The target has the &Reference[frightened apply=false] condition until the end of your next turn.

Fey Step.name: Fey Step
Fey Step.description: The steed teleports, along with its rider, to an unoccupied space of your choice up to 60 feet away from itself.

Healing Touch.name: Healing Touch
Healing Touch.description: One creature within 5 feet of the steed regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus the spell's level.

Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 1d4 + 3.

Move.name: Move
Move.description: As a Bonus Action, you can move the eye up to 30 feet in any direction. A solid barrier blocks the eye's movement, but the eye can pass through an opening as small as 1 inch in diameter.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: @Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.rules.JournalEntry.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0.JournalEntryPage.3UU5GCTVeRDbZy9u inline]

Clenched Fist.name: Clenched Fist
Clenched Fist.description: The hand strikes a target within 5 feet of it. Make a melee spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 Force damage.

Forceful Hand.name: Forceful Hand
Forceful Hand.description: The hand attempts to push a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw, or the hand pushes the target up to 5 feet plus a number of feet equal to five times your spellcasting ability modifier. The hand moves with the target, remaining within 5 feet of it.

Grasping Hand.name: Grasping Hand
Grasping Hand.description:
The hand attempts to grapple a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw, or the target has the &Reference[Grappled] condition, with an escape DC equal to your spell save DC. While the hand grapples the target, you can take a Bonus Action to cause the hand to crush it, dealing Bludgeoning damage to the target equal to 4d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Grapple Escape Tests

[[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=8+@prof+@flags.dnd5e.summon.mod]]{Strength (Athletics)} [[/check ability=dex skill=acr dc=8+@prof+@flags.dnd5e.summon.mod]]{Dexterity (Acrobatics)}

Interposing Hand.name: Interposing Hand
Interposing Hand.description: The hand grants you &Reference[HalfCover] against attacks and other effects that originate from its space or that pass through it. In addition, its space counts as &Reference[DifficultTerrain] for your enemies.

Interposed.name: Interposed
Interposed.description: Granting you &Reference[HalfCover] from attacks or effects that pass through its space.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: At the start of each of its turns, the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target repeats the [[/save ability=dex]] save. On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of your next turn, with both you and the spirit as the source of the fear.

Flames.name: Flames
Flames.description: You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Roll.name: Roll
Roll.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet, rolling it along the ground. If you move the sphere into a creature's space, that creature makes the save against the sphere, and the sphere stops moving for the turn.

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. Flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried start burning if touched by the sphere.

Carry Weight Adjustment.name: Carry Weight Adjustment
Carry Weight Adjustment.description:
Nota do Foundry

This item serves to offset the disk's computed carry weight capacity from 510 lbs. to 500 lbs. in accordance with the spell's description.

Guarded Area.name: Guarded Area
Guarded Area.description:
Any enemy that moves to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The guardian vanishes when it has dealt a total of 60 damage.

Nota do Foundry

This feature's Limited Uses is optionally provided for tracking the total damage dealt by the guardian. Additionally, The Consume Damage Pool activity is configured with scaling uses consumption in increments of 5 damage for use after the final damage is determined and applied.

Move and Attack.name: Move and Attack
Move and Attack.description: On your later turns, you can take a Bonus Action to move the sword up to 30 feet to a spot you can see and repeat the attack against the same target or a different one. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 4d12 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Move and Attack.name: Move and Attack
Move and Attack.description:
As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Usando Espaços de Magia de Círculo Superior. The damage increases by 1d8 for every slot level above 2.

Hooves.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.
